FIT-INBOUND-01.overview: An 11-day wildlife adventure through India’s premier national parks, featuring tiger safaris, jungle treks, and cultural highlights in Delhi and Mumbai. Explore dense forests, spot rare wildlife, and experience the thrill of India’s Big Five in protected reserves.

days.title: Arrival in Delhi
days.description: Arrive in Delhi and transfer to your hotel. Spend the evening at leisure, exploring nearby markets or relaxing after your journey.

days.title: Delhi sightseeing
days.description: Visit the historic Red Fort, Jama Masjid, and Humayun’s Tomb. In the afternoon, explore Chandni Chowk for local cuisine and shopping.

days.title: Fly to Jabalpur – Bandhavgarh
days.description: Fly to Jabalpur and drive to Bandhavgarh National Park. Enjoy a late afternoon safari to spot tigers and other wildlife in the park.

days.title: Bandhavgarh jungle safaris
days.description: Embark on two morning and evening safaris in Bandhavgarh, known for its high tiger density. Visit the ancient Bandhavgarh Fort for panoramic views.

days.title: Bandhavgarh to Kanha
days.description: Drive to Kanha National Park, stopping at the scenic Bamarha meadows. Enjoy a short safari upon arrival to acclimate to the park.

days.title: Kanha jungle safaris
days.description: Spend the day on jeep safaris in Kanha, famous for its barasingha (swamp deer) and tiger sightings. Visit the Kanha Museum to learn about the park’s ecology.

days.title: Kanha to Pench
days.description: Travel to Pench National Park, stopping at the historic Sitabuldi Fort in Nagpur. Enjoy a relaxed evening at the lodge.

days.title: Pench jungle safaris
days.description: Explore Pench’s dense forests on safaris, known for its leopards and wild dogs. Visit the Pench River, a key water source for wildlife.

days.title: Pench to Tadoba
days.description: Drive to Tadoba Andhari Tiger Reserve, stopping at Chandrapur for lunch. Enjoy a night safari to spot nocturnal wildlife.

days.title: Tadoba jungle safaris
days.description: Spend the day on safaris in Tadoba, one of India’s best tiger reserves. Visit the Tadoba Lake for birdwatching and scenic views.

days.title: Departure from Mumbai
days.description: Drive to Nagpur for your flight to Mumbai. Spend your last evening exploring Marine Drive or local markets before departure.

FIT-INBOUND-02.overview: Explore the ancient rock-cut caves of Maharashtra, showcasing stunning Buddhist, Hindu, and Jain architecture. This 6-day tour covers Nashik's historic sites and the UNESCO-listed Ajanta and Ellora caves near Aurangabad.

days.title: Arrival in Nashik
days.description: Arrive in Nashik, a historic city known for its vineyards and religious significance. Check into your hotel and relax before exploring the local markets and temples.

days.title: Nashik – Panchavati & Sula Vineyards
days.description: Visit Panchavati, a sacred area with temples like Kalaram and Muktidham. Later, tour Sula Vineyards for wine tasting and vineyard insights.

days.title: Nashik to Aurangabad – Travel Day
days.description: Travel to Aurangabad, a city steeped in Mughal history. En route, stop at Daulatabad Fort for panoramic views and medieval architecture.

days.title: Ajanta Caves – UNESCO Marvel
days.description: Explore the 2nd-century Ajanta Caves, featuring intricate Buddhist murals and carvings. Spend the day admiring the rock-cut chaityas and viharas.

days.title: Ellora Caves – Kailash Temple
days.description: Discover the Ellora Caves, a UNESCO site with 34 caves spanning Hindu, Buddhist, and Jain traditions. Marvel at the monolithic Kailash Temple, a masterpiece of ancient engineering.

days.title: Departure from Aurangabad
days.description: After breakfast, transfer to Aurangabad airport or railway station for departure. Reflect on the journey through Maharashtra's cave heritage.

FIT-INBOUND-03.overview: This 7-day tribal tour of eastern India explores the rich cultural heritage and indigenous traditions of Odisha’s tribal communities. The journey covers sacred sites, tribal villages, and scenic landscapes from Bhubaneshwar to remote regions near the Andhra Pradesh border.

days.title: Arrival in Bhubaneshwar
days.description: Arrive at Bhubaneshwar airport or railway station and transfer to your hotel. Spend the evening exploring the ancient Lingaraj Temple, a 7th-century Shiva shrine, and enjoy Odia cuisine at a local restaurant.

days.title: Bhubaneshwar city tour
days.description: Visit the Dhauli Shanti Stupa, a Buddhist monument marking the site of Ashoka’s conversion after the Kalinga War. Explore the Odisha State Museum to learn about tribal artifacts and regional history.

days.title: Bhubaneshwar to Gopalpur
days.description: Travel to Gopalpur-on-Sea, a serene coastal town, and relax on its golden beaches. Visit the nearby Taratarini Temple, a Shakti Peetha perched on a hill overlooking the Rushikulya River.

days.title: Gopalpur to Raygada
days.description: Drive to Raygada, a gateway to Odisha’s tribal heartland, and visit the tribal market to observe daily life and crafts. Meet local Dongria Kondh or Saura tribes to learn about their unique traditions and sustainable farming.

days.title: Raygada tribal village visit
days.description: Spend the day in a remote tribal village near Raygada, participating in cultural exchanges and observing traditional dance performances. Learn about indigenous medicinal plants from local healers.

days.title: Raygada to Jeypore
days.description: Travel to Jeypore, a historic town surrounded by lush forests, and visit the Jeypore Palace. Explore the weekly tribal market to purchase handmade crafts like Dokra metalwork and Saura paintings.

days.title: Departure from Jeypore
days.description: After breakfast, transfer to Jeypore airport or railway station for your onward journey. Reflect on the tribal experiences and cultural insights gained during the tour.

FIT-INBOUND-04.overview: A rejuvenating 8-day Ayurveda and wellness retreat in Kerala, India, blending traditional treatments, serene landscapes, and holistic healing. Experience detoxification, yoga, meditation, and authentic Kerala cuisine in a tranquil setting.

days.title: Arrival in Kochi & Transfer to Resort
days.description: Arrive at Kochi International Airport (COK). Meet our representative for a private transfer to Carnoustie Ayurveda & Wellness Resort in Kerala. Check-in, relax, and enjoy a welcome Ayurvedic drink. Evening free to unwind. Overnight at the resort.

days.title: Ayurvedic Consultation & Initial Treatments
days.description: Morning: Consultation with an Ayurvedic doctor to assess your dosha (body constitution) and create a personalized wellness plan. Afternoon: Begin gentle Ayurvedic therapies such as Abhyanga (oil massage) and Shirodhara (forehead oil flow). Evening: Guided meditation session. Overnight at the resort.

days.title: Detox & Panchakarma Introduction
days.description: Morning: Start with a gentle detox program including herbal steam baths and Udwarthanam (herbal powder massage). Afternoon: Introduction to Panchakarma therapies with a focus on Virechana (purgation therapy) as per your dosha. Evening: Yoga session focusing on detoxification. Overnight at the resort.

days.title: Deep Tissue & Marma Therapy
days.description: Morning: Deep tissue Ayurvedic massage to release toxins and improve circulation. Afternoon: Marma therapy (energy point stimulation) to balance prana (life force). Evening: Ayurvedic cooking class to learn about healing spices and meals. Overnight at the resort.

days.title: Nature Therapy & Village Tour
days.description: Morning: Guided nature walk through lush tea gardens and spice plantations. Afternoon: Visit a local village to experience rural Kerala life and traditional crafts. Evening: Relaxing Ayurvedic foot massage and sound healing session. Overnight at the resort.

days.title: Rejuvenation & Mindfulness Day
days.description: Morning: Rejuvenating Pizhichil (warm oil bath therapy). Afternoon: Mindfulness workshop including breathwork (Pranayama) and journaling. Evening: Sunset yoga session by the resort’s pool or garden. Overnight at the resort.

days.title: Spa & Wellness Exploration
days.description: Morning: Full-body Ayurvedic massage with herbal compresses (Kizhi). Afternoon: Access to the resort’s wellness facilities including sauna, steam bath, and infinity pool. Evening: Farewell Ayurvedic dinner with traditional Kerala dishes. Overnight at the resort.

days.title: Departure from Kochi
days.description: Morning: Light yoga session and Ayurvedic breakfast. Check-out and private transfer to Kochi International Airport for departure. Safe travels!

FIT-INBOUND-06.overview: This 8-day tour explores the cultural and natural highlights of Nepal, starting in Kathmandu with its historic temples, then venturing into the wildlife-rich Chitwan National Park, and ending with the scenic beauty of Pokhara and its lakes. The journey blends heritage, adventure, and relaxation in one of the world's most diverse countries.

days.title: Arrival in Kathmandu
days.description: Arrive at Tribhuvan International Airport and transfer to your hotel. Spend the evening exploring nearby Thamel, a vibrant hub for shopping and dining, to acclimate to the city's rhythm.

days.title: Kathmandu Sightseeing Tour
days.description: Visit the UNESCO-listed Durbar Square, Swayambhunath Stupa (Monkey Temple), and Pashupatinath Temple. Experience the blend of Newari architecture and spiritual traditions in the heart of the city.

days.title: Fly to Chitwan National Park
days.description: Take a short flight to Bharatpur and drive to Chitwan National Park. Enjoy a welcome drink and orientation before a gentle jungle walk to spot local birds and wildlife.

days.title: Chitwan Jungle Safari
days.description: Embark on an early morning jeep safari to spot one-horned rhinos, elephants, and crocodiles. In the afternoon, visit a Tharu village to learn about indigenous culture and traditions.

days.title: Chitwan to Pokhara Flight
days.description: Fly from Chitwan to Pokhara, a scenic gateway to the Annapurna range. Relax by Phewa Lake and enjoy views of the Himalayas from your hotel balcony.

days.title: Pokhara Lakeside Exploration
days.description: Visit Davis Falls and the World Peace Pagoda for panoramic lake and mountain views. Take a boat ride on Phewa Lake and explore the colorful markets of Lakeside.

days.title: Pokhara Adventure Day
days.description: Choose between paragliding, zip-lining, or a short trek to Sarangkot for sunrise views over the Annapurna range. Alternatively, visit the International Mountain Museum.

days.title: Departure from Kathmandu
days.description: Transfer to the airport for your onward journey. If time permits, pick up last-minute souvenirs from Thamel before heading home.

FIT-INBOUND-11.overview: An 8-day journey through Nepal's highlights, starting in the cultural hub of Kathmandu, followed by a wildlife adventure in Chitwan National Park, and ending with the serene beauty of Pokhara.

days.title: Arrival in Kathmandu
days.description: Arrive at Tribhuvan International Airport in Kathmandu. Transfer to your hotel and check-in. Spend the evening exploring nearby Thamel for dinner and shopping.

days.title: Kathmandu Sightseeing
days.description: Full-day cultural tour covering UNESCO World Heritage Sites: Swayambhunath Stupa (Monkey Temple), Pashupatinath Temple, Boudhanath Stupa, and Kathmandu Durbar Square.

days.title: Travel to Chitwan National Park
days.description: Morning drive to Chitwan National Park (approx. 5-6 hours). Afternoon activities include a jungle walk and visit to the Tharu Cultural Museum. Evening cultural dance performance.

days.title: Chitwan National Park Safari
days.description: Full-day jungle activities: jeep safari, bird watching, canoe ride, and elephant bathing. Explore the park's biodiversity and wildlife.

days.title: Chitwan to Pokhara
days.description: Morning drive to Pokhara (approx. 5-6 hours). Afternoon free to relax by Phewa Lake. Visit the World Peace Pagoda for sunset views.

days.title: Pokhara Adventure
days.description: Morning paragliding or ultralight flight over Pokhara Valley. Afternoon visit to Davis Falls and Gupteswor Mahadev Cave. Optional: boating on Phewa Lake.

days.title: Pokhara Exploration
days.description: Morning hike to Sarangkot for sunrise views over the Annapurna range. Visit the International Mountain Museum. Afternoon free for leisure or shopping.

days.title: Departure from Pokhara
days.description: Morning free for last-minute sightseeing or shopping. Transfer to Pokhara Airport for departure.

FIT-INBOUND-12.overview: A 7-day journey through Sri Lanka's cultural heartland, scenic hill country, and coastal paradise, featuring tea plantations, wildlife, and pristine beaches.

days.title: Arrival in Kandy
days.description: Arrive at Bandaranaike International Airport (CMB), transfer to Kandy (approx. 3 hours). Check-in at a heritage hotel. Visit the Temple of the Sacred Tooth Relic and enjoy a cultural dance performance in the evening.

days.title: Kandy Exploration
days.description: Morning: Explore the Kandy Lake and Udawatta Kele Sanctuary. Afternoon: Visit the Royal Botanical Gardens in Peradeniya. Evening: Relax at a local café or explore the bustling Kandy market.

days.title: Kandy to Nuwara Eliya
days.description: Morning: Scenic train journey to Nuwara Eliya (approx. 4 hours) through tea plantations. Afternoon: Visit a tea factory, stroll through Victoria Park, and explore the town's colonial architecture. Evening: Enjoy a fireside dinner at the hotel.

days.title: Nuwara Eliya Adventure
days.description: Morning: Hike to Little Adam's Peak or visit the Hakgala Botanical Gardens. Afternoon: Explore the picturesque Gregory Lake and visit a local strawberry farm. Evening: Relax at the hotel or enjoy a game of golf.

days.title: Nuwara Eliya to Bentota
days.description: Morning: Drive to Bentota (approx. 5 hours) via the scenic route, stopping at a spice garden. Afternoon: Check-in at a beachfront resort. Relax on the golden sands or enjoy water sports like snorkeling and kayaking.

days.title: Bentota Leisure
days.description: Full day at leisure in Bentota. Options include a boat safari on the Bentota River, visiting the Mask Museum, or simply relaxing at the beach. Evening: Enjoy a seafood dinner by the shore.

days.title: Departure from Bentota
days.description: Morning: Free time for last-minute beach walks or souvenir shopping. Afternoon: Transfer to Bandaranaike International Airport (CMB) for departure.

FIT-INBOUND-13.overview: A 7-day cultural and natural journey through the heart of India, exploring the historic forts of Gwalior, the UNESCO-listed temples of Khajuraho, the serene Panna National Park, and the scenic beauty of Jabalpur.

days.title: Arrival in Gwalior
days.description: Arrive in Gwalior, a city steeped in history. Check into your hotel and relax. In the evening, explore the local markets and enjoy a traditional Indian dinner.

days.title: Exploring Gwalior
days.description: Visit the majestic Gwalior Fort, one of India's largest forts, and explore its palaces, temples, and museums. Afternoon visit to the Jai Vilas Palace, a stunning example of European architecture. Evening at leisure.

days.title: Travel to Khajuraho
days.description: Morning drive to Khajuraho (approx. 5-6 hours). Afternoon visit to the Western Group of Temples, a UNESCO World Heritage Site, known for their intricate carvings. Evening cultural dance performance.

days.title: Khajuraho Temples & Local Culture
days.description: Morning visit to the Eastern and Southern Group of Temples. Afternoon explore local villages and crafts. Evening at leisure or optional sound and light show at the temples.

days.title: Travel to Panna & Safari
days.description: Morning drive to Panna (approx. 3 hours). Afternoon embark on a safari in Panna National Park, home to tigers, leopards, and diverse birdlife. Evening at the resort.

days.title: Panna to Jabalpur
days.description: Morning visit to the Pandava Falls and nearby temples. Afternoon drive to Jabalpur (approx. 4-5 hours). Evening stroll along the Narmada River and visit the Marble Rocks.

days.title: Departure from Jabalpur
days.description: Morning free for last-minute shopping or sightseeing. Afternoon transfer to Jabalpur airport/railway station for departure.

FIT-INBOUND-14.overview: A 10-day journey through North East India, exploring the lush landscapes, wildlife, and cultural heritage of Manas, Shillong, Cherrapunjee, Nameri, and Kaziranga.

days.title: Arrival in Guwahati
days.description: Arrive at Lokpriya Gopinath Bordoloi International Airport (GAU) in Guwahati. Transfer to Manas (approx. 3 hours drive). Check-in at a jungle resort. Evening at leisure. Overnight in Manas.

days.title: Manas National Park Exploration
days.description: Full-day safari in Manas National Park, a UNESCO World Heritage Site. Spot Bengal tigers, one-horned rhinos, elephants, and diverse birdlife. Visit the Manas River and local tribal villages. Overnight in Manas.

days.title: Manas to Shillong
days.description: Morning drive to Shillong (approx. 5 hours). Visit Elephant Falls, Shillong Peak, and the Don Bosco Museum. Evening stroll at Ward’s Lake. Overnight in Shillong.

days.title: Shillong City Tour
days.description: Explore local markets, visit the Cathedral of Mary Help of Christians, and enjoy the vibrant cafes. Optional: Visit the Living Root Bridges in Mawlynnong (if time permits). Overnight in Shillong.

days.title: Shillong to Cherrapunjee
days.description: Drive to Cherrapunjee (approx. 2.5 hours). Visit the Nohkalikai Falls, Mawsmai Caves, and the living root bridges at Riwai. Explore the town’s limestone caves and caves. Overnight in Cherrapunjee.

days.title: Cherrapunjee Adventure
days.description: Full-day trek to the double-decker living root bridges, visit the Dainthlen Falls, and explore the Eco Park. Evening at leisure. Overnight in Cherrapunjee.

days.title: Cherrapunjee to Nameri
days.description: Morning drive to Nameri National Park (approx. 4 hours). Afternoon jeep safari or river rafting on the Jia Bhoroli River. Overnight in Nameri.

days.title: Nameri National Park
days.description: Full-day wildlife safari in Nameri. Spot elephants, tigers, and a variety of bird species. Optional: Visit the nearby Bhalukpong for scenic views. Overnight in Nameri.

days.title: Nameri to Kaziranga
days.description: Drive to Kaziranga National Park (approx. 3 hours). Evening jeep safari in the park. Overnight in Kaziranga.

days.title: Departure from Kaziranga
days.description: Morning jeep safari in Kaziranga to spot one-horned rhinos, elephants, and other wildlife. After breakfast, transfer to Jorhat Airport (JRH) for departure.

FIT-INBOUND-15.overview: A 6-day cultural and spiritual journey through the heart of Uttar Pradesh, exploring the ancient city of Varanasi, the sacred confluence in Prayagraj, the historic Ayodhya, and the Nawabi elegance of Lucknow.

days.title: Arrival in Varanasi
days.description: Arrive in Varanasi, one of the world's oldest living cities. Check into your hotel and rest. In the evening, take a leisurely walk along the ghats of the Ganges River. Attend the mesmerizing Ganga Aarti at Dashashwamedh Ghat. Overnight in Varanasi.

days.title: Exploring Varanasi
days.description: Morning boat ride on the Ganges to witness the sunrise and visit the ghats. Explore the narrow lanes of the old city, visit Kashi Vishwanath Temple, and stop by the Banarasi silk weaving centers. Afternoon visit to Sarnath, the site of Buddha's first sermon. Evening free for local exploration or shopping. Overnight in Varanasi.

days.title: Varanasi to Prayagraj
days.description: Morning drive to Prayagraj (approx. 12 hours). En route, visit Chunar Fort and Mirzapur. Arrive in Prayagraj, check into the hotel, and relax. Evening visit to Triveni Sangam, the confluence of the Ganges, Yamuna, and mythical Saraswati rivers. Attend the evening Aarti at the Sangam. Overnight in Prayagraj.

days.title: Prayagraj to Ayodhya
days.description: Morning visit to Allahabad Fort, Anand Bhavan, and the Allahabad Museum. Afternoon drive to Ayodhya (approx. 6 hours). Arrive in Ayodhya, check into the hotel, and visit the evening Aarti at Sarayu River ghats. Overnight in Ayodhya.

days.title: Exploring Ayodhya
days.description: Full day dedicated to exploring Ayodhya's spiritual and historical sites. Visit Ram Janmabhoomi, Hanuman Garhi, Kanak Bhawan, and Nandigram. Evening visit to the newly constructed Ram Mandir and participate in the evening rituals. Overnight in Ayodhya.

days.title: Ayodhya to Lucknow & Departure
days.description: Morning drive to Lucknow (approx. 6 hours). Visit the Bara Imambara, Chota Imambara, and Rumi Darwaza. Enjoy a traditional Lucknowi lunch featuring Nawabi cuisine. Afternoon free for last-minute shopping or sightseeing. Evening transfer to the airport for departure.

FIT-INBOUND-16.overview: An 8-day cultural and scenic journey through Bhutan, starting from the southern border town of Phuentsholing, exploring the capital Thimphu, the historic Punakha Valley, and the iconic Paro, before returning to Phuentsholing for departure.

days.title: Arrival in Phuentsholing
days.description: Arrive at Phuentsholing, the southern gateway to Bhutan. Complete immigration formalities and transfer to Thimphu (3.5 hours). Check-in at a hotel and relax. Explore the local market and visit the Phuentsholing Dzong.

days.title: Thimphu Sightseeing
days.description: Visit the National Memorial Chorten, Buddha Dordenma, and Tashi Chho Dzong. Explore the Folk Heritage Museum and the Textile Museum. Evening at leisure.

days.title: Drive to Punakha
days.description: Drive to Punakha (3 hours) via Dochula Pass (108 chortens). Visit Punakha Dzong and Chimi Lhakhang. Evening stroll along the Mo Chhu River.

days.title: Punakha Exploration
days.description: Morning hike to Khamsum Yulley Namgyal Chorten. Afternoon visit to the Royal Botanical Garden and a short nature walk. Relax and enjoy the serene surroundings.

days.title: Drive to Paro
days.description: Drive to Paro (4 hours) via Dochula Pass. Visit Paro Rinpung Dzong and the National Museum. Evening at leisure in Paro town.

days.title: Paro Valley & Tiger's Nest
days.description: Full-day trek to the iconic Tiger's Nest Monastery (Paro Taktsang). Afternoon visit to Kyichu Lhakhang and local handicraft shops.

days.title: Paro to Phuentsholing
days.description: Drive back to Phuentsholing (6 hours). Visit the Amo Chhu Nature Park and local markets. Overnight stay in Phuentsholing.

days.title: Departure from Phuentsholing
days.description: After breakfast, complete departure formalities and transfer to the border for exit.

FIT-INBOUND-17.overview: A 15-day immersive Ayurvedic retreat combining Panchakarma detoxification with mindfulness practices at Dharana, set against the serene hills of Lonavala. This holistic journey blends traditional healing therapies, yoga, and meditation to rejuvenate mind, body, and spirit.

days.title: Arrival in Lonavala
days.description: Arrive at Lonavala railway station or Pune airport and transfer to the retreat center. Check-in, settle into your tranquil accommodation, and enjoy a welcome Ayurvedic tea ceremony to begin your detox journey.

days.title: Orientation & Dosha Assessment
days.description: Participate in an initial consultation with Ayurvedic doctors to determine your dosha (body constitution). Enjoy a light herbal lunch followed by a guided tour of the retreat facilities and evening meditation session.

days.title: Introduction to Panchakarma
days.description: Attend a detailed session on Panchakarma therapies and their benefits. Begin with Abhyanga (oil massage) to prepare the body for deeper detoxification. Relax with a nature walk in the surrounding hills.

days.title: Snehana & Swedana Therapy
days.description: Experience Snehana (oleation therapy) followed by Swedana (herbal steam bath) to loosen toxins. Enjoy a light Ayurvedic diet and participate in a group yoga session to enhance circulation.

days.title: Virechana (Purgation Therapy)
days.description: Undergo Virechana, a controlled purgation process to cleanse the gastrointestinal tract. Spend the afternoon in restorative yoga and a guided breathing workshop to support the detox process.

days.title: Basti (Enema Therapy) Session
days.description: Begin Basti therapy, a specialized Ayurvedic enema treatment for balancing Vata dosha. Relax with a gentle meditation session and enjoy a nourishing herbal soup for dinner.

days.title: Nasya (Nasal Therapy) Day
days.description: Receive Nasya treatment to clear sinus congestion and improve mental clarity. Participate in a mindfulness workshop and enjoy a peaceful evening by the retreat’s waterfall.

days.title: Rest & Rejuvenation
days.description: A lighter therapy day focused on rest and rejuvenation. Enjoy a full-body massage with herbal oils and spend time journaling or reading in the serene garden setting.

days.title: Yoga & Meditation Retreat
days.description: Engage in a full-day yoga and meditation program led by experienced instructors. Practice asanas to improve flexibility and participate in a sunset meditation overlooking the valley.

days.title: Ayurvedic Diet Workshop
days.description: Learn about Ayurvedic nutrition and how to incorporate healing foods into daily meals. Prepare a simple Ayurvedic dish under expert guidance and enjoy a communal lunch.

days.title: Nature Therapy & Forest Bathing
days.description: Participate in a guided forest therapy session in the lush surroundings of Lonavala. Practice grounding exercises and mindful walking to reconnect with nature.

days.title: Final Panchakarma Session
days.description: Complete the final phase of Panchakarma with a personalized therapy session. Reflect on your journey with a one-on-one consultation with the Ayurvedic doctor.

days.title: Silent Reflection Day
days.description: A day dedicated to silent reflection and introspection. Enjoy gentle yoga, meditation, and journaling in a peaceful environment to integrate your healing experience.

days.title: Cultural Exploration in Lonavala
days.description: Visit the scenic Lohagad Fort for a light hike and panoramic views. Explore local markets for Ayurvedic herbs and souvenirs before returning for a farewell dinner.

days.title: Departure from Lonavala
days.description: After a final Ayurvedic breakfast, check out and transfer to Lonavala railway station or Pune airport for your onward journey, carrying the benefits of your rejuvenating retreat.

FIT-INBOUND-7.overview: Experience the diverse flavors and landscapes of Kerala and Tamil Nadu with this 11-day journey through backwaters, spice plantations, wildlife sanctuaries, and colonial heritage. Stay at premium CGH Earth hotels offering authentic local hospitality and cuisine.

days.title: Arrival in Cochin – Welcome to Kerala
days.description: Arrive at Cochin International Airport and transfer to your hotel. Spend the evening relaxing and enjoying a traditional Kerala welcome drink and light dinner.

days.title: Cochin – Forts, spices and Kathakali
days.description: Explore Fort Kochi’s colonial landmarks like the Chinese Fishing Nets and Mattancherry Palace. Attend a Kathakali performance in the evening and savor a seafood dinner by the waterfront.

days.title: Cochin to Kumarakom – Backwaters cruise
days.description: Drive to Kumarakom and enjoy a serene houseboat cruise through Vembanad Lake’s tranquil backwaters. Visit Kumarakom Bird Sanctuary to spot migratory birds in the late afternoon.

days.title: Kumarakom – Village life and fishing
days.description: Participate in a traditional fishing net demonstration and visit local coconut farms. Relax with a Kerala-style Ayurvedic massage at the resort before an early dinner.

days.title: Kumarakom to Thekkady – Spice plantation tour
days.description: Travel to Thekkady and tour a lush spice plantation, learning about cardamom, pepper, and vanilla cultivation. Enjoy a guided jungle walk in Periyar National Park in the late afternoon.

days.title: Thekkady – Wildlife and bamboo rafting
days.description: Take a jeep safari into Periyar Tiger Reserve to spot elephants and other wildlife. Later, enjoy a bamboo rafting adventure on the Periyar River followed by a campfire dinner.

days.title: Thekkady to Chettinad – Heritage trail begins
days.description: Drive to Chettinad and visit the ornate Chettinad mansions showcasing 19th-century Tamil Nadu architecture. Enjoy a traditional Chettinad vegetarian lunch at a heritage home.

days.title: Chettinad – Temples and silk weaving
days.description: Explore the grand Athangudi Temple and learn about Chettinad’s famous silk and cotton weaving at a local workshop. Sample authentic Chettinad cuisine for dinner.

days.title: Chettinad to Pondicherry – French Quarter walk
days.description: Travel to Pondicherry and stroll through the charming French Quarter with its colonial villas and bougainvillea-lined streets. Visit the Aurobindo Ashram and enjoy a sunset at the Promenade.

days.title: Pondicherry – Auroville and beaches
days.description: Spend the morning at Auroville, exploring the Matrimandir and visiting craft workshops. Relax on Serenity Beach in the afternoon before a farewell dinner.

days.title: Departure from Pondicherry
days.description: After breakfast, transfer to Pondicherry Airport for your onward journey, carrying memories of Kerala’s culture and cuisine.

FIT-INBOUND-8.overview: An 8-day immersive tour of Kerala, showcasing its lush landscapes, serene backwaters, and wildlife, featuring stays at premium CGH Earth Hotels. Experience spice plantations, houseboat cruises, and cultural highlights.

days.title: Arrival in Cochin
days.description: Arrive in Cochin (Kochi), Kerala. Check-in at CGH Earth’s Bolgatty Palace Hotel. Explore Fort Kochi’s colonial charm, Jewish Synagogue, and Chinese fishing nets. Evening cultural performance.

days.title: Cochin to Thekkady
days.description: Morning drive to Thekkady (4-5 hrs). Visit a spice plantation en route. Afternoon at Periyar Wildlife Sanctuary: boat safari to spot elephants, tigers, and birds. Stay at CGH Earth’s Spice Grove.

days.title: Thekkady Exploration
days.description: Full-day activities in Thekkady: bamboo rafting, jungle trekking, or Ayurvedic spa treatments. Optional visit to tribal villages. Evening at leisure. Stay at Spice Grove.

days.title: Thekkady to Kumarakom
days.description: Morning drive to Kumarakom (3-4 hrs). Check-in at CGH Earth’s Kumarakom Lake Resort. Afternoon houseboat cruise on Vembanad Lake. Sunset fishing village visit. Evening Kathakali dance show.

days.title: Kumarakom Leisure
days.description: Sunrise birdwatching at Kumarakom Bird Sanctuary. Kayaking or village cycling tour. Ayurvedic wellness session. Stay at Kumarakom Lake Resort.

days.title: Kumarakom to Marari
days.description: Morning drive to Marari Beach (1.5 hrs). Check-in at CGH Earth’s Marari Beach Resort. Relax on pristine beaches, coconut grove walks, and seafood feasts. Sunset bonfire on the shore.

days.title: Marari Beach Day
days.description: Full-day at leisure: beach yoga, fishing with locals, or Ayurvedic treatments. Optional village tour or backwater fishing. Farewell seafood dinner under the stars.

days.title: Departure from Cochin
days.description: Morning transfer to Cochin airport (1.5 hrs). Flight home or onward journey.

INBOUND-01.overview: A 9-day cultural and historical journey through Maharashtra, exploring the vibrant city of Mumbai, the heritage of Pune, the ancient caves of Aurangabad, and the spiritual vineyards of Nashik. This tour blends urban exploration, architectural marvels, and serene landscapes.

days.title: Arrival in Mumbai – Gateway of India
days.description: Arrive in Mumbai and check into your hotel. Visit the iconic Gateway of India and take a short ferry ride to the Elephanta Caves to explore ancient rock-cut temples. Enjoy a welcome dinner at a local seafood restaurant.

days.title: Mumbai – Colonial & Modern
days.description: Explore Mumbai’s colonial heritage with visits to the Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj Terminus and the Taj Mahal Palace Hotel. Visit the bustling Crawford Market and the serene Haji Ali Dargah. End the day with a dusk walk at Marine Drive.

days.title: Mumbai to Pune – Shivaji Legacy
days.description: Travel to Pune and visit the grand Shaniwar Wada fort, a symbol of Maratha power. Explore the Aga Khan Palace, a historic landmark associated with Mahatma Gandhi. Enjoy a traditional Maharashtrian lunch in the city.

days.title: Pune – Temples & Education
days.description: Visit the revered Dagadusheth Ganapati Temple and the historic Parvati Hill for panoramic views. Explore the Osho International Meditation Resort and the prestigious Fergusson College. Spend the evening exploring the lively FC Road.

days.title: Pune to Aurangabad – Ajanta Caves
days.description: Travel to Aurangabad and visit the UNESCO-listed Ajanta Caves, known for their ancient Buddhist murals and sculptures. Enjoy a traditional Aurangabad delicacy, like Naan Qalia, for dinner. Relax at your heritage hotel.

days.title: Aurangabad – Ellora & Grishneshwar
days.description: Explore the magnificent Ellora Caves, a UNESCO site featuring rock-cut temples from Hindu, Buddhist, and Jain traditions. Visit the nearby Grishneshwar Jyotirlinga Temple, one of the twelve sacred Shiva temples. Enjoy a cultural dance performance in the evening.

days.title: Aurangabad to Nashik – Wine & Temples
days.description: Travel to Nashik, known as the wine capital of India. Visit the ancient Kalaram Temple and the serene Panchavati ghats. Enjoy a wine tasting session at a local vineyard and a traditional Maharashtrian dinner.

days.title: Nashik – Spiritual & Scenic
days.description: Explore the Trimbakeshwar Jyotirlinga Temple, one of the holiest Shiva temples. Visit the scenic Anjaneri Fort and the peaceful Muktidham Temple. Spend the evening strolling through the lively Nashik market.

days.title: Nashik to Mumbai – Departure
days.description: Travel back to Mumbai for your departure. Depending on your flight time, you may visit the Chhatrapati Shivaji International Airport or enjoy a quick city tour if time permits. Bid farewell to Maharashtra.

INBOUND-010.overview: Experience the cultural and historical richness of South India on this 11-day journey through Tamil Nadu and Kerala. The tour explores ancient temples, coastal heritage, colonial charm, and serene backwaters, offering a blend of spirituality, architecture, and natural beauty.

days.title: Arrival in Chennai
days.description: Arrive in Chennai, the gateway to South India. Check into your hotel and relax after your journey. In the evening, enjoy a cultural performance showcasing traditional Bharatanatyam dance.

days.title: Chennai city tour
days.description: Visit the iconic Marina Beach and the majestic Vivekananda Rock Memorial. Explore the Government Museum and Kapaleeshwarar Temple, a prime example of Dravidian architecture.

days.title: Mahabalipuram exploration
days.description: Discover the UNESCO-listed Shore Temple and the ancient rock-cut caves of Mahabalipuram. Witness the famous Five Rathas and enjoy a traditional coastal lunch by the Bay of Bengal.

days.title: Pondicherry heritage walk
days.description: Stroll through the charming streets of Pondicherry, visiting the Aurobindo Ashram and the iconic French Quarter. Enjoy a sunset at the Promenade and savor French-Indian cuisine.

days.title: Pondicherry to Thanjavur
days.description: Travel to Thanjavur, the cultural capital of the Chola dynasty. Visit the UNESCO-listed Brihadeeswarar Temple, a masterpiece of Dravidian architecture and engineering.

days.title: Thanjavur palace and art
days.description: Explore the Thanjavur Maratha Palace and the Royal Palace Museum. Visit the Saraswathi Mahal Library, housing ancient palm-leaf manuscripts and rare books.

days.title: Thanjavur to Madurai
days.description: Journey to Madurai, the temple city. Visit the Meenakshi Amman Temple, a stunning complex with colorful gopurams and sacred shrines.

days.title: Madurai temple rituals
days.description: Witness the early morning temple rituals at Meenakshi Amman Temple. Explore the Thirumalai Nayakkar Palace and the bustling streets of Madurai's bazaars.

days.title: Madurai to Kerala
days.description: Travel to Kerala, the 'God's Own Country.' Arrive in Alleppey and enjoy a serene houseboat cruise through the tranquil backwaters.

days.title: Kerala backwaters and village
days.description: Experience the beauty of Kerala's backwaters with a village walk and a traditional Kathakali dance performance. Relax and soak in the peaceful surroundings.

days.title: Departure from Kochi
days.description: After breakfast, transfer to Kochi for your departure. If time permits, visit Fort Kochi and the Chinese fishing nets before heading to the airport.

INBOUND-011.overview: A 9-day wildlife adventure tour covering India's premier national parks and heritage sites, starting in Delhi and ending in Agra. Experience thrilling safaris in Kanha and Bandhavgarh tiger reserves, explore ancient temples in Khajuraho, and marvel at the Taj Mahal.

days.title: Arrival in Delhi
days.description: Arrive in Delhi, transfer to hotel. Evening at leisure to explore local markets or relax. Overnight in Delhi.

days.title: Delhi to Kanha National Park
days.description: Early morning flight to Jabalpur, followed by a scenic drive to Kanha National Park (3-4 hours). Afternoon jeep safari in Kanha. Overnight in Kanha.

days.title: Kanha National Park Safari
days.description: Full-day jeep safaris in Kanha National Park, known for its Bengal tigers, barasingha, and stunning landscapes. Evening at leisure. Overnight in Kanha.

days.title: Kanha to Bandhavgarh National Park
days.description: Morning drive to Bandhavgarh National Park (5-6 hours). Afternoon jeep safari in the park. Overnight in Bandhavgarh.

days.title: Bandhavgarh National Park Safari
days.description: Full-day jeep safaris in Bandhavgarh, famous for its high tiger density and scenic beauty. Evening at leisure. Overnight in Bandhavgarh.

days.title: Bandhavgarh to Khajuraho
days.description: Morning drive to Khajuraho (6-7 hours). Afternoon visit to the Western Group of Temples, a UNESCO World Heritage Site. Overnight in Khajuraho.

days.title: Khajuraho Exploration
days.description: Morning visit to the Eastern Group of Temples. Afternoon at leisure to explore local culture or relax. Overnight in Khajuraho.

days.title: Khajuraho to Agra
days.description: Morning drive to Agra (7-8 hours). Afternoon visit to Agra Fort. Evening visit to the Taj Mahal for sunset views. Overnight in Agra.

days.title: Departure from Agra
days.description: Morning visit to the Taj Mahal for sunrise views. After breakfast, transfer to the airport for departure.

INBOUND-012.overview: A 15-day wildlife and cultural retreat across India, blending heritage exploration, thrilling safaris, and serene landscapes. From the bustling streets of Delhi to the royal forts of Rajasthan, the majestic Taj Mahal, and the untamed wilderness of central India's tiger reserves, this journey offers a perfect mix of adventure, history, and relaxation.

days.title: Arrival in Delhi
days.description: Arrive in Delhi, India's vibrant capital. Transfer to your hotel and rest. In the evening, enjoy a welcome dinner and a brief orientation of the tour.

days.title: Explore Old & New Delhi
days.description: Visit the historic Red Fort, Jama Masjid, and Chandni Chowk in Old Delhi. In the afternoon, explore New Delhi's landmarks including Humayun's Tomb, India Gate, and Qutub Minar.

days.title: Travel to Jaipur
days.description: Morning drive to Jaipur (approx. 5 hours). Visit Amber Fort, Hawa Mahal, and City Palace. Evening at leisure to explore local markets.

days.title: Jaipur – The Pink City
days.description: Visit Jantar Mantar, Albert Hall Museum, and stroll through Johari Bazaar. Optional: Experience a traditional Rajasthani village walk or hot air balloon ride.

days.title: Travel to Ranthambore
days.description: Morning drive to Ranthambore National Park (approx. 4 hours). Afternoon safari in the park. Evening at leisure to relax.

days.title: Safari in Ranthambore
days.description: Full-day safari in Ranthambore National Park. Explore the park's diverse flora and fauna, with high chances of spotting Bengal tigers. Evening at leisure.

days.title: Travel to Agra
days.description: Morning drive to Agra (approx. 5 hours). Visit Agra Fort in the afternoon. Evening at leisure.

days.title: Taj Mahal & Mughal Heritage
days.description: Early morning visit to the Taj Mahal at sunrise. Explore Mehtab Bagh for a panoramic view. Visit Itmad-ud-Daulah and Sikandra Fort. Evening at leisure.

days.title: Travel to Khajuraho
days.description: Morning flight to Khajuraho (via Delhi). Visit the Western Group of Temples in the afternoon. Evening cultural dance performance.

days.title: Khajuraho – Temples & Scenic Beauty
days.description: Explore the Eastern Group of Temples and local village life. Optional: Visit the Raneh Falls or enjoy a village walk. Evening at leisure.

days.title: Travel to Bandhavgarh
days.description: Morning flight to Jabalpur, then drive to Bandhavgarh National Park (approx. 3.5 hours). Afternoon safari. Evening at leisure.

days.title: Safari in Bandhavgarh
days.description: Full-day safari in Bandhavgarh National Park. Known for high tiger density, explore the park's diverse landscapes. Evening at leisure.

days.title: Travel to Kanha
days.description: Morning drive to Kanha National Park (approx. 4 hours). Afternoon safari. Evening at leisure.

days.title: Safari in Kanha
days.description: Full-day safari in Kanha National Park. Explore the park's meadows and forests, known for its wildlife including tigers and barasingha. Evening cultural program.

days.title: Departure from Mumbai
days.description: Morning transfer to Jabalpur airport for a flight to Mumbai. Connect to your international departure flight.

INBOUND-013.overview: A 6-day panoramic tour of Leh Ladakh covering the vibrant capital Leh, the scenic Nubra Valley, and the breathtaking Pangong Lake, with cultural insights, adventure activities, and stunning landscapes.

days.title: Arrival in Leh - Acclimatization & Local Exploration
days.description: Arrive in Leh, the capital of Ladakh. Spend the day acclimatizing to the high altitude. Explore the local markets, visit the Leh Palace, and stroll through the bustling streets of the old town. Optional: Visit the Shanti Stupa for panoramic views of Leh.

days.title: Leh to Nubra Valley via Khardung La Pass
days.description: Drive to Nubra Valley, one of the most beautiful regions in Ladakh. Cross the world's highest motorable pass, Khardung La (18,380 ft). Visit Diskit Monastery and enjoy the sand dunes of Hunder. Optional: Camel ride on the sand dunes.

days.title: Nubra Valley - Explore & Return to Leh
days.description: Spend the morning exploring Nubra Valley further. Visit the Samstanling Monastery and enjoy the serene landscapes. Afternoon drive back to Leh. Evening at leisure to relax or explore more of Leh.

days.title: Leh to Pangong Lake via Chang La Pass
days.description: Drive to Pangong Lake, one of the most famous and stunning high-altitude lakes in the world. Cross the Chang La Pass (17,590 ft). Enjoy the mesmerizing blue waters of Pangong Lake and explore the nearby villages.

days.title: Pangong Lake - Full Day Exploration & Return to Leh
days.description: Spend the day at Pangong Lake. Enjoy activities like photography, short hikes, and soaking in the serene beauty. Afternoon drive back to Leh. Evening at leisure.

days.title: Departure from Leh
days.description: Morning at leisure for last-minute shopping or sightseeing. Transfer to Leh airport for departure.

INBOUND-014.overview: A 10-day immersive journey through the stunning landscapes of Leh & Ladakh, featuring high-altitude deserts, serene lakes, ancient monasteries, and the picturesque Nubra Valley. This itinerary balances adventure, culture, and relaxation while acclimatizing to the high altitude.

days.title: Arrival in Leh - Acclimatization
days.description: Arrive at Leh Airport (IXL), transfer to your hotel. Spend the day resting and acclimatizing to the high altitude (3,500m). Explore Leh Market in the evening for local handicrafts and souvenirs. Overnight in Leh.

days.title: Leh Sightseeing - Hemis & Thiksey Monasteries
days.description: Full-day cultural tour visiting Hemis Monastery (largest in Ladakh), Thiksey Monastery (Tibetan-style), and Shey Palace. Stop at the Magnetic Hill and Sangam (confluence of Indus and Zanskar rivers). Return to Leh for overnight stay.

days.title: Leh to Nubra Valley via Khardung La Pass
days.description: Early morning drive to Khardung La Pass (5,359m, one of the world's highest motorable roads). Descend into Nubra Valley, visit Diskit Monastery and Hunder Sand Dunes. Optional camel safari on the dunes. Stay overnight in Hunder or Diskit.

days.title: Nubra Valley Exploration
days.description: Morning visit to Samstanling Monastery. Afternoon free to relax or explore nearby villages. Optional activities: ATV rides or visit to Panamik hot springs. Overnight in Nubra Valley.

days.title: Nubra Valley to Pangong Tso via Shyok River
days.description: Early morning drive to Pangong Tso (14,270ft), one of the world's highest saltwater lakes. En route, cross the scenic Shyok River and stop at Tangtse village. Explore the lake's different shades of blue. Overnight in a lakeside camp or guesthouse.

days.title: Pangong Tso - Full Day Exploration
days.description: Early morning visit to the lake's eastern shore (Indian side). Optional short trek to vantage points for panoramic views. Return to Leh in the afternoon via Chang La Pass (5,360m). Overnight in Leh.

days.title: Leh to Tso Moriri via Chumathang
days.description: Long drive to Tso Moriri (15,000ft), a pristine high-altitude lake in Changthang region. En route, stop at Chumathang hot springs and Kyagar Tso (Bird Lake). Explore the lake area and spot wildlife. Overnight in Korzok or nearby guesthouse.

days.title: Tso Moriri Exploration & Return to Leh
days.description: Morning visit to Korzok Monastery and local nomadic settlements. Afternoon drive back to Leh via Upshi village. Relax and explore Leh town in the evening. Overnight in Leh.

days.title: Leh Free Day - Optional Activities
days.description: Flexible day for optional activities: Visit Spituk Monastery, Stok Palace, or take a short trek to Zingchen. Alternatively, relax at a café or explore local markets. Evening cultural show (optional). Overnight in Leh.

days.title: Departure from Leh
days.description: Morning free for last-minute shopping or sightseeing. Transfer to Leh Airport for departure. End of the journey.

INBOUND-015.overview: A 10-day immersive journey through Northeast India, exploring the cultural and natural wonders of Assam, Meghalaya, and Arunachal Pradesh. Experience wildlife in Kaziranga, colonial charm in Shillong, and the serene Himalayan landscapes of Tawang and Dirang.

days.title: Arrival in Guwahati
days.description: Arrive at Lokpriya Gopinath Bordoloi International Airport (GAU) in Guwahati. Transfer to your hotel and relax. Explore the city's highlights like the Assam State Museum, Umananda Island Temple, and the vibrant Paltan Bazaar. Evening at leisure.

days.title: Guwahati to Kaziranga
days.description: Morning drive to Kaziranga National Park (approx. 4-5 hours). Check-in at a wildlife resort. Afternoon jeep safari in the park to spot one-horned rhinos, elephants, and migratory birds. Evening at leisure.

days.title: Kaziranga Exploration
days.description: Early morning elephant safari followed by jeep safari in Kaziranga. Visit the nearby tea gardens and interact with local tea workers. Evening at leisure or optional cultural program.

days.title: Kaziranga to Shillong
days.description: Morning drive to Shillong (approx. 6-7 hours). En route, visit the charming town of Nagaon. Check-in at a hotel in Shillong. Evening explore the local markets and try Khasi cuisine.

days.title: Shillong Sightseeing
days.description: Full-day tour of Shillong including Elephant Falls, Shillong Peak, Ward's Lake, and the Don Bosco Museum. Evening visit to the bustling Police Bazaar for shopping.

days.title: Shillong to Tawang
days.description: Early morning drive to Tawang (approx. 10-12 hours). En route, stop at Bomdila for lunch and to explore the local monastery. Check-in at a hotel in Tawang. Evening at leisure.

days.title: Tawang Exploration
days.description: Visit the iconic Tawang Monastery, the largest in India. Explore the serene Sela Pass (weather permitting) and the beautiful Tawang War Memorial. Evening at leisure.

days.title: Tawang to Dirang
days.description: Morning drive to Dirang (approx. 3-4 hours). En route, visit the Sangti Valley for its scenic beauty and birdwatching. Check-in at a resort in Dirang. Evening at leisure.

days.title: Dirang Exploration
days.description: Visit the Dirang Dzong, a historic fortress, and the nearby hot springs. Explore local villages and interact with the Monpa community. Evening at leisure.

days.title: Departure
days.description: Morning transfer to Guwahati Airport (approx. 6-7 hours). Flight back home.

INBOUND-016.overview: A 12-day immersive journey through North East India, exploring the scenic beauty, cultural heritage, and wildlife of Sikkim, West Bengal, Meghalaya, and Assam. The tour includes visits to serene monasteries, picturesque valleys, tea gardens, and the world-famous Kaziranga National Park.

days.title: Arrival in Gangtok, Sikkim
days.description: Arrive at Bagdogra Airport or New Jalpaiguri Railway Station (NJP) and transfer to Gangtok (approx. 4-5 hours drive). Check-in at a hotel. Evening at leisure to explore local markets or relax. Overnight in Gangtok.

days.title: Gangtok Sightseeing
days.description: Full-day sightseeing in Gangtok: Visit the Enchey Monastery, Rumtek Monastery, Tsomgo Lake (Changu Lake, subject to weather conditions), Baba Harbhajan Singh Mandir, and the Institute of Tibetology. Evening stroll at MG Marg. Overnight in Gangtok.

days.title: Gangtok to Lachen
days.description: Drive to Lachen (approx. 4-5 hours), a picturesque village in North Sikkim. En route, stop at Seven Sisters Waterfalls and Phodong Monastery. Arrive in Lachen, check-in at a homestay. Evening at leisure. Overnight in Lachen.

days.title: Lachen to Lachung
days.description: Morning drive to Lachung (approx. 2-3 hours). Explore the charming village, visit Lachung Monastery, and enjoy the scenic beauty of the Yumthang Valley (subject to weather conditions). Return to Lachung for overnight stay.

days.title: Lachung to Pelling
days.description: Drive to Pelling (approx. 6-7 hours). En route, visit the historic Rabdentse Ruins and Pemayangtse Monastery. Arrive in Pelling, check-in at a hotel. Evening at leisure to enjoy the views of Mount Kanchenjunga. Overnight in Pelling.

days.title: Pelling Sightseeing
days.description: Full-day sightseeing in Pelling: Visit the Sangay Waterfall, Khecheopalri Lake, and the famous Khangchendzonga Falls. Evening at leisure. Overnight in Pelling.

days.title: Pelling to Shillong
days.description: Morning drive to Shillong (approx. 8-9 hours). En route, stop at Teesta Bazaar for lunch. Arrive in Shillong, check-in at a hotel. Evening at leisure to explore the local markets. Overnight in Shillong.

days.title: Shillong Sightseeing
days.description: Full-day sightseeing in Shillong: Visit the Elephant Falls, Shillong Peak, Ward’s Lake, and the Don Bosco Museum. Evening at leisure. Overnight in Shillong.

days.title: Shillong to Kaziranga
days.description: Morning drive to Kaziranga National Park (approx. 3-4 hours). En route, visit the Nohkalikai Falls. Arrive in Kaziranga, check-in at a wildlife resort. Evening at leisure. Overnight in Kaziranga.

days.title: Kaziranga Safari & Exploration
days.description: Morning and evening jeep safaris in Kaziranga National Park to spot the one-horned rhinoceros, elephants, and other wildlife. Visit the Kaziranga Orchid Park and the nearby tea gardens. Overnight in Kaziranga.

days.title: Kaziranga to Guwahati
days.description: Morning drive to Guwahati (approx. 4-5 hours). En route, visit the Hoollongapar Gibbon Sanctuary. Arrive in Guwahati, check-in at a hotel. Evening at leisure to explore the city. Overnight in Guwahati.

days.title: Departure from Guwahati
days.description: Morning at leisure. Transfer to Guwahati Airport or Railway Station for departure.

INBOUND-02.overview: Experience the grandeur of India's royal heritage on this 16-day journey through historic palaces, forts, and cultural landmarks. From the bustling streets of Delhi to the spiritual ghats of Varanasi and the serene temples of Khajuraho, this tour offers a blend of opulence, history, and spirituality.

days.title: Arrival in Delhi
days.description: Arrive in India's capital and transfer to your hotel. Spend the evening at leisure, exploring nearby markets or relaxing after your journey.

days.title: Old Delhi heritage walk
days.description: Explore the historic lanes of Old Delhi, visiting the Jama Masjid and Chandni Chowk. Enjoy a traditional Mughlai lunch before visiting the Red Fort.

days.title: New Delhi royal sights
days.description: Visit the grand Rashtrapati Bhavan and Humayun's Tomb. Afternoon at leisure to explore Connaught Place or visit the Qutub Minar.

days.title: Fly to Udaipur – City of Lakes
days.description: Fly to Udaipur and check into your heritage hotel. Visit the City Palace and enjoy a sunset boat ride on Lake Pichola.

days.title: Udaipur royal palaces tour
days.description: Explore the Jagdish Temple and Saheliyon-ki-Bari garden. Evening at leisure to explore local markets or enjoy a cultural performance.

days.title: Travel to Jaipur by road
days.description: Drive to Jaipur, stopping at Abhaneri stepwell en route. Arrive in Jaipur and visit the Amber Fort with an elephant ride.

days.title: Jaipur royal palaces & markets
days.description: Visit the Hawa Mahal and City Palace. Explore Johari Bazaar for traditional Rajasthani souvenirs and crafts.

days.title: Jaipur to Agra – Taj Mahal
days.description: Drive to Agra, visiting Fatehpur Sikri en route. Arrive in Agra and visit the Taj Mahal at sunset.

days.title: Agra Fort & Mughal heritage
days.description: Explore Agra Fort and Mehtab Bagh for a moonlit view of the Taj. Evening at leisure to enjoy local Mughlai cuisine.

days.title: Orchha – Hidden royal gem
days.description: Drive to Orchha, visiting Jhansi Fort en route. Explore the Orchha Fort complex and Ram Raja Temple.

days.title: Khajuraho temples & dance
days.description: Fly to Khajuraho and visit the Western Group of Temples. Evening cultural dance performance at the temple complex.

days.title: Varanasi – Spiritual Ganga
days.description: Fly to Varanasi and visit the Dashashwamedh Ghat for the Ganga Aarti ceremony. Explore the narrow lanes of the old city.

days.title: Varanasi boat ride & silk
days.description: Sunrise boat ride on the Ganges, visiting the ghats and temples. Visit a silk weaving workshop in the afternoon.

days.title: Fly to Kathmandu
days.description: Fly to Kathmandu and check into your hotel. Visit Swayambhunath Stupa and explore Thamel market in the evening.

days.title: Kathmandu heritage tour
days.description: Visit the Durbar Square and Pashupatinath Temple. Enjoy a farewell dinner with Nepali cultural performances.

days.title: Departure from Kathmandu
days.description: Transfer to the airport for your onward journey. End of the tour with cherished memories of Indian and Nepali royalty.

INBOUND-03.overview: This 15-day Heritage Trail tour explores India's rich cultural and architectural legacy, from Mughal and Rajput monuments in Delhi to ancient temples in Khajuraho and medieval ruins in Mandu. The journey blends history, art, and scenic landscapes across key heritage sites.

days.title: Arrival in Delhi – Welcome to India
days.description: Arrive in Delhi and transfer to your hotel. Enjoy a welcome dinner featuring North Indian cuisine, followed by a brief orientation to the tour.

days.title: Old Delhi Exploration
days.description: Visit the Jama Masjid, Chandni Chowk, and the Red Fort. Explore the bustling spice and textile markets before a heritage walk through the walled city.

days.title: New Delhi Landmarks
days.description: Tour the India Gate, Humayun’s Tomb, and Qutub Minar. Experience the contrast between colonial and Mughal architecture in Lutyens' Delhi.

days.title: Travel to Gwalior – Fort & Palaces
days.description: Travel to Gwalior by train or road. Visit the imposing Gwalior Fort and the intricately carved Sas Bahu Temples.

days.title: Gwalior’s Cultural Gems
days.description: Explore the Jai Vilas Palace Museum and the Teli Ka Mandir. Attend a local Sufi music performance in the evening.

days.title: Travel to Khajuraho – Temples of Love
days.description: Travel to Khajuraho by road. Visit the Western Group of Temples, famous for their intricate erotic sculptures.

days.title: Khajuraho Dance Festival
days.description: Explore the Eastern and Southern Group of Temples. In the evening, enjoy a classical dance performance at the Khajuraho Dance Festival (seasonal).

days.title: Travel to Orchha – Riverside Heritage
days.description: Travel to Orchha by road. Visit the Orchha Fort Complex, including Jahangir Mahal and Ram Raja Temple.

days.title: Orchha’s Temples & Palaces
days.description: Explore the Chaturbhuj Temple and the cenotaphs along the Betwa River. Enjoy a sunset boat ride on the river.

days.title: Travel to Bhopal – Lakes & Mosques
days.description: Travel to Bhopal by road. Visit the Upper Lake and the historic Taj-ul-Masajid, one of India’s largest mosques.

days.title: Bhopal’s Museums & Markets
days.description: Tour the State Museum and the Tribal Museum. Explore the local markets for handicrafts and textiles.

days.title: Travel to Mandu – Medieval Ruins
days.description: Travel to Mandu by road. Visit the Jahaz Mahal and Hindola Mahal, showcasing Afghan architecture.

days.title: Mandu’s Palaces & Gardens
days.description: Explore the Rani Rupmati Pavilion and the Baz Bahadur Palace. Enjoy panoramic views from the Darwaza-e-Alamgir.

days.title: Travel to Mumbai – City of Dreams
days.description: Travel to Mumbai by flight. Visit the Gateway of India and Colaba Causeway for a taste of urban India.

days.title: Departure from Mumbai
days.description: Spend the morning at leisure before transferring to the airport for your departure flight.

INBOUND-05.overview: A 13-day journey through Rajasthan's most iconic forts and palaces, starting in Delhi and exploring the golden deserts, royal heritage, and vibrant culture of India's 'Land of Kings'.

days.title: Arrival in Delhi
days.description: Arrive in Delhi, the capital of India. Transfer to your hotel and rest after your journey. Evening at leisure to explore nearby markets or relax.

days.title: Delhi Sightseeing
days.description: Visit Old Delhi's historic sites including the Red Fort, Jama Masjid, and Chandni Chowk. Afternoon visit to New Delhi's landmarks like Humayun's Tomb, Qutub Minar, and India Gate.

days.title: Delhi to Neemrana
days.description: Drive to Neemrana (approx. 2.5 hours). Visit Neemrana Fort Palace, a 15th-century hill fort turned heritage hotel. Explore the palace and enjoy the panoramic views.

days.title: Neemrana to Jaipur
days.description: Drive to Jaipur (approx. 3 hours). Visit Amber Fort, Hawa Mahal, City Palace, and Jantar Mantar. Evening at leisure to explore local markets.

days.title: Jaipur Exploration
days.description: Full day in Jaipur: Visit Jai Garh Fort, Nahargarh Fort, Albert Hall Museum, and enjoy a traditional Rajasthani dinner with cultural performances.

days.title: Jaipur to Gajner
days.description: Drive to Gajner (approx. 5 hours). Visit Gajner Palace and enjoy a sunset boat ride on Gajner Lake. Relax in the serene surroundings.

days.title: Gajner to Jaisalmer
days.description: Drive to Jaisalmer (approx. 4.5 hours). Visit Jaisalmer Fort, Patwon Ki Haveli, and the intricately carved Jain Temples. Evening camel safari in the Thar Desert.

days.title: Jaisalmer Exploration
days.description: Full day in Jaisalmer: Explore the golden fort, Bada Bagh, and take a desert safari with cultural performances and dinner under the stars.

days.title: Jaisalmer to Luni
days.description: Drive to Luni (approx. 1 hour). Visit Luni Fort and enjoy a traditional Rajasthani lunch. Explore the local village and interact with artisans.

days.title: Luni to Rohet
days.description: Drive to Rohet (approx. 2 hours). Visit Rohetgarh Fort and enjoy a cultural experience with local folk artists. Relax at the heritage property.

days.title: Rohet to Devigarh
days.description: Drive to Devigarh (approx. 4 hours). Visit Devigarh Fort and explore the palace's architecture and gardens. Enjoy a peaceful evening.

days.title: Devigarh Exploration
days.description: Full day in Devigarh: Visit nearby villages, enjoy nature walks, and experience local crafts. Evening at leisure to relax at the fort.

days.title: Departure from Delhi
days.description: Drive back to Delhi (approx. 6 hours). Transfer to the airport for your departure flight.

INBOUND-06.overview: Experience the rich cultural heritage, royal history, and coastal charm of Gujarat on this 14-day tour. From vibrant Ahmedabad to the serene beaches of Diu and the ancient wonders of Bhuj, this itinerary offers a blend of history, wildlife, and local traditions.

days.title: Arrival in Ahmedabad
days.description: Arrive in Ahmedabad, the commercial capital of Gujarat. Check into your hotel and relax after your journey. Spend the evening exploring the local markets or visiting the famous Sidi Saiyyed Mosque.

days.title: Ahmedabad – Heritage Walk
days.description: Join the Heritage Walk, a guided tour through the old city’s pols (traditional neighborhoods). Visit the Jama Masjid, Bhadra Fort, and Gandhi Ashram to learn about Ahmedabad’s history and Gandhi’s legacy.

days.title: Ahmedabad – Sabarmati Ashram
days.description: Visit the Sabarmati Ashram, Gandhi’s former residence, and explore the museum showcasing his life and teachings. Later, visit the Calico Museum of Textiles to admire rare fabric collections.

days.title: Ahmedabad to Bhavnagar
days.description: Travel to Bhavnagar, a historic city known for its shipbuilding industry. Visit the Nilambagh Palace and the Barton Library. Explore the vibrant Gandhi Smarak Bhavan and local markets.

days.title: Bhavnagar – Blackbuck National Park
days.description: Head to the Blackbuck National Park to spot the endangered blackbuck antelope and other wildlife. Enjoy a jeep safari through the grasslands and learn about the region’s biodiversity.

days.title: Bhavnagar to Diu
days.description: Drive to Diu, a charming coastal union territory with Portuguese influences. Visit Diu Fort, Nagoa Beach, and the St. Paul’s Church. Enjoy fresh seafood at the local restaurants.

days.title: Diu – Island Exploration
days.description: Explore Diu’s beaches, including Ghogla Beach and Sunset Point. Visit the Diu Museum and the Nagoa Aquarium. Relax by the sea and enjoy water sports like parasailing.

days.title: Diu to Sasangir
days.description: Travel to Sasangir, home to the Gir National Park, the last abode of the Asiatic lion. Enjoy a jungle safari to spot lions, leopards, and other wildlife in their natural habitat.

days.title: Sasangir – Gir Forest Safari
days.description: Embark on a full-day safari in Gir National Park to see Asiatic lions, deer, and birds. Visit the Devalia Safari Park for a controlled wildlife experience. Learn about conservation efforts in the region.

days.title: Sasangir to Gondal
days.description: Drive to Gondal, a former princely state known for its royal heritage. Visit the Naulakha Palace, the Orchard Palace, and the Swaminarayan Temple. Explore the local markets for handicrafts.

days.title: Gondal – Royal Heritage Tour
days.description: Tour the royal palaces and museums in Gondal, including the Royal Chowk and the Huzoor Palace. Visit the famous Gondal toy museum and enjoy a traditional Gujarati meal at a local restaurant.

days.title: Gondal to Bhuj
days.description: Travel to Bhuj, a historic city in Kutch. Visit the Aina Mahal, Prag Mahal, and the Swaminarayan Temple. Explore the local handicrafts and the vibrant Bhujodi village known for its weaving.

days.title: Bhuj – Rann of Kutch
days.description: Visit the Great Rann of Kutch, a vast salt marsh known for its surreal landscape. Explore the seasonal white desert and enjoy cultural performances at the Rann Utsav if visiting during the festival season.

days.title: Departure from Ahmedabad
days.description: After breakfast, transfer to Ahmedabad for your departure. Spend any remaining time shopping for souvenirs or visiting local attractions before heading to the airport.

INBOUND-07.overview: Embark on a royal journey through India's golden triangle and beyond, exploring the regal heritage of Rajasthan. This 14-day tour showcases palaces, forts, and desert landscapes, blending history, culture, and adventure.

days.title: Arrival in Delhi – Welcome to India
days.description: Arrive in the capital city and transfer to your hotel. Spend the evening at leisure, soaking in the vibrant atmosphere of Delhi.

days.title: Delhi – Historic Landmarks Tour
days.description: Visit the Red Fort, Jama Masjid, and Chandni Chowk in Old Delhi. In the afternoon, explore Humayun’s Tomb and Qutub Minar in New Delhi.

days.title: Delhi to Mandawa – Shekhawati Havelis
days.description: Drive to Mandawa, a charming town in Shekhawati. Explore the ornate havelis like Mandawa Haveli and Murmuria Haveli, showcasing frescoes and Rajasthani art.

days.title: Mandawa to Bikaner – Camel Country
days.description: Travel to Bikaner, known for its rich history and camel culture. Visit Junagarh Fort and explore the old city’s bustling markets.

days.title: Bikaner – Jain Temples & Sweets
days.description: Discover the intricate architecture of Bhandasar Jain Temple and Laxmi Niwas Palace. Sample Bikaner’s famous sweets like bhujia and rasgullas.

days.title: Bikaner to Jaisalmer – Golden Desert
days.description: Drive to Jaisalmer, the golden city of the Thar Desert. Visit the Jaisalmer Fort and enjoy a sunset camel ride in the dunes.

days.title: Jaisalmer – Desert Safari Adventure
days.description: Explore the Sam Sand Dunes and enjoy a cultural program with folk dances. Spend the night in a desert camp under the stars.

days.title: Jaisalmer to Jodhpur – Blue City Views
days.description: Travel to Jodhpur, the Blue City. Visit Mehrangarh Fort and explore the vibrant streets of the old city.

days.title: Jodhpur – Heritage & Culture
days.description: Discover Jaswant Thada and Umaid Bhawan Palace. Stroll through the bustling Sardar Market for local crafts and textiles.

days.title: Jodhpur to Udaipur – Lakes & Palaces
days.description: Drive to Udaipur, the City of Lakes. Visit City Palace and enjoy a boat ride on Lake Pichola.

days.title: Udaipur – Royal Heritage Walk
days.description: Explore Jagdish Temple, Bagore Ki Haveli, and Saheliyon-ki-Bari. Experience a traditional Rajasthani dinner with cultural performances.

days.title: Udaipur to Jaipur – Pink City Arrival
days.description: Travel to Jaipur, the Pink City. Visit Amber Fort and enjoy a shopping spree at Johari Bazaar.

days.title: Jaipur – Royal Sightseeing Tour
days.description: Explore Hawa Mahal, City Palace, and Jantar Mantar. Enjoy a farewell dinner with Rajasthani folk music and dance.

days.title: Departure from Jaipur
days.description: After breakfast, transfer to Jaipur Airport for your onward journey. Bid farewell to the royal lands of Rajasthan.

Inbound-09.overview: Experience the serene beauty of Kerala with this 11-day itinerary, starting in Cochin and ending in Kovalam. Explore lush tea plantations, tranquil backwaters, wildlife sanctuaries, and pristine beaches, immersing yourself in the rich culture and natural splendor of God's Own Country.

days.title: Arrival in Cochin
days.description: Arrive in Cochin (Kochi), Kerala's vibrant port city. Check into your hotel and spend the evening exploring the historic Fort Kochi area. Visit the iconic Chinese Fishing Nets, St. Francis Church, and the Jewish Synagogue. Enjoy a traditional Kerala seafood dinner.

days.title: Cochin Sightseeing
days.description: After breakfast, visit the Hill Palace Museum, Kerala's largest archaeological museum. Then, explore the spice market and the Dutch Palace. In the evening, attend a Kathakali dance performance, a classical art form of Kerala.

days.title: Travel to Munnar
days.description: Morning drive to Munnar, a picturesque hill station known for its tea plantations. En route, visit the waterfalls and viewpoints like Cheeyappara and Valara. Check into a tea estate bungalow and relax with the cool mountain air.

days.title: Explore Munnar
days.description: Full day in Munnar. Visit the Eravikulam National Park to spot the endangered Nilgiri Tahr. Explore the Tea Museum, Mattupetty Dam, and the beautiful Echo Point. Enjoy a sunset at Top Station for panoramic views.

days.title: Munnar to Thekkady
days.description: Morning drive to Thekkady, home to the Periyar National Park. En route, visit the spice plantations and learn about Kerala's spice trade. Check into a jungle resort and enjoy a relaxing evening.

days.title: Thekkady Wildlife Safari
days.description: Morning and evening wildlife safaris in Periyar National Park. Spot elephants, tigers, leopards, and various bird species. Enjoy a bamboo rafting experience on the Periyar Lake. In the evening, witness a traditional Kathakali performance.

days.title: Travel to Kumarakom
days.description: Morning drive to Kumarakom, a serene backwater destination on Vembanad Lake. Check into a lakeside resort and enjoy a houseboat cruise at sunset. Relax and unwind in the tranquil surroundings.

days.title: Kumarakom to Alleppey
days.description: Morning drive to Alleppey, the Venice of the East. Check into a houseboat and embark on a backwater cruise through the palm-fringed canals, lagoons, and lakes. Enjoy a traditional Kerala lunch onboard.

days.title: Alleppey Backwaters
days.description: Full day houseboat cruise. Explore the serene backwaters, interact with local fishermen, and visit small villages. Enjoy the scenic beauty, lush greenery, and peaceful ambiance. Overnight stay on the houseboat.

days.title: Travel to Kovalam
days.description: Morning drive to Kovalam, a coastal town known for its beautiful beaches. Check into a beachfront resort and relax. In the evening, visit the Vizhinjam Marine Aquarium and enjoy a seafood dinner by the beach.

days.title: Departure from Kovalam
days.description: Morning at leisure to enjoy the beach or indulge in some last-minute shopping. After breakfast, transfer to Trivandrum International Airport for departure.

INBOUND-12.overview: A rejuvenating 12-day Ayurveda and Spa tour across Kerala, India, blending traditional healing therapies, serene backwaters, and coastal relaxation. Explore Kochi’s cultural heritage, Kumarakom’s tranquil lakes, Alleppey’s houseboat cruises, and Kovalam’s pristine beaches, all while indulging in authentic Ayurvedic treatments and spa therapies.

days.title: Arrival in Kochi
days.description: Arrive at Kochi International Airport (COK). Transfer to a heritage hotel in Fort Kochi. Evening leisure walk along Marine Drive. Overnight stay in Kochi.

days.title: Kochi – Cultural Exploration & Ayurvedic Consultation
days.description: Morning sightseeing: Jewish Synagogue, Mattancherry Palace, and Fort Kochi. Afternoon visit to an Ayurvedic wellness center for consultation and initial relaxation therapies. Overnight in Kochi.

days.title: Kochi to Kumarakom – Backwaters & Ayurvedic Therapies
days.description: Drive to Kumarakom (1.5 hours). Check-in at a lakeside Ayurvedic resort. Afternoon session of Abhyanga (oil massage) and Shirodhara (head oil treatment). Evening houseboat cruise on Vembanad Lake. Overnight in Kumarakom.

days.title: Kumarakom – Ayurvedic Rejuvenation & Village Tour
days.description: Full-day Ayurvedic therapies including Pizhichil (oil bath) and Njavarakizhi (rice bolus massage). Afternoon village tour by canoe to experience local life and birdwatching. Overnight in Kumarakom.

days.title: Kumarakom to Alleppey – Houseboat Embarkation
days.description: Morning transfer to Alleppey (1 hour). Board a private houseboat with Ayurvedic chef onboard. Begin serene backwater cruise through palm-fringed canals. Evening yoga session on deck. Overnight on houseboat.

days.title: Alleppey – Backwaters & Ayurvedic Sessions
days.description: Morning yoga and meditation on the houseboat. Mid-morning Ayurvedic session (Udvartana or herbal steam bath). Afternoon cruise through narrow waterways and visit to village markets. Overnight on houseboat.

days.title: Alleppey to Kovalam – Coastal Transition
days.description: Morning disembarkation and drive to Kovalam (3.5 hours). Check-in at a beachfront Ayurvedic resort. Afternoon beach walk and light Ayurvedic consultation. Overnight in Kovalam.

days.title: Kovalam – Ayurvedic Detox & Beach Relaxation
days.description: Full-day Ayurvedic therapies including Elakizhi (leaf bolus massage) and Kati Vasti (lower back treatment). Evening beachside meditation and sound healing session. Overnight in Kovalam.

days.title: Kovalam – Yoga & Marine Therapies
days.description: Morning yoga session on the beach. Afternoon session of Navarakizhi (rice and milk bolus massage) and herbal steam bath. Evening visit to Vizhinjam Marine Aquarium. Overnight in Kovalam.

days.title: Kovalam – Leisure & Optional Spa
days.description: Free day for personal relaxation or optional spa treatments (e.g., Ayurvedic facials, body scrubs). Evening cultural performance (Kathakali or classical music). Overnight in Kovalam.

days.title: Kovalam to Kochi – Return & Souvenirs
days.description: Morning drive back to Kochi (3.5 hours). Visit local markets for Ayurvedic oils and souvenirs. Final Ayurvedic consultation and light therapy session. Overnight in Kochi.

days.title: Departure from Kochi
days.description: Morning transfer to Kochi International Airport for departure. End of the Ayurveda and Spa journey.

INBOUND-13.overview: Embark on an 8-day cultural journey aboard the luxurious Palace on Wheels train, exploring India's royal heritage, historic forts, and vibrant cities. From the Pink City of Jaipur to the golden sands of Jaisalmer, this itinerary blends heritage, adventure, and opulence.

days.title: Arrival in Delhi & Boarding the Palace on Wheels
days.description: Arrive in Delhi and transfer to the railway station to board the Palace on Wheels. Enjoy a welcome drink and orientation before the train departs for Jaipur in the evening.

days.title: Jaipur - The Pink City
days.description: Explore Jaipur's iconic landmarks including the Amber Fort, Hawa Mahal, City Palace, and Jantar Mantar. Enjoy a cultural performance and dinner at the train.

days.title: Chittorgarh - Land of Legends
days.description: Visit the majestic Chittorgarh Fort, one of India's largest forts, and explore its palaces, temples, and towers. Learn about the heroic tales of Rajputana.

days.title: Udaipur - City of Lakes
days.description: Discover Udaipur's royal heritage with visits to the City Palace, Jagdish Temple, and a serene boat ride on Lake Pichola. Enjoy a sunset view from the City Palace.

days.title: Jaisalmer - The Golden City
days.description: Explore the golden-hued Jaisalmer Fort, Patwon Ki Haveli, and enjoy a desert safari with camel ride and cultural performances under the stars.

days.title: Jodhpur - The Blue City
days.description: Visit the Mehrangarh Fort, Jaswant Thada, and explore the vibrant blue streets of the Old City. Enjoy a traditional Rajasthani dinner.

days.title: Agra - The City of Taj
days.description: Visit the iconic Taj Mahal at sunrise, explore Agra Fort, and visit the Fatehpur Sikri complex. Return to the train for a farewell dinner.

days.title: Departure from Delhi
days.description: Arrive in Delhi and transfer to the airport/hotel for departure after breakfast.

INBOUND-15.overview: A 10-day immersive journey through the Andaman and Nicobar Islands, starting in Port Blair and exploring the pristine beaches and lush landscapes of Havelock and Neil Islands.

days.title: Arrival in Port Blair
days.description: Arrive at Veer Savarkar International Airport in Port Blair. Check into your hotel and relax. Visit the nearby Cellular Jail to learn about India's freedom struggle. Evening stroll at the local market.

days.title: Port Blair Exploration
days.description: Morning visit to the Anthropological Museum to understand the indigenous tribes of the islands. Afternoon trip to Corbyn's Cove Beach for relaxation. Evening at the Science Centre.

days.title: Travel to Havelock Island
days.description: Morning ferry to Havelock Island (approx. 2 hours). Check into your resort. Afternoon at Radhanagar Beach, one of Asia's best beaches. Sunset at Elephant Beach.

days.title: Havelock Island Adventure
days.description: Full-day snorkeling and glass-bottom boat tour at North Bay Island. Explore the vibrant coral reefs and marine life. Evening at Beach No. 7 for a relaxed dinner.

days.title: Havelock Island Leisure
days.description: Morning visit to Vijaynagar Beach and Kalapathar Beach. Afternoon at Govind Nagar Beach. Optional activities like kayaking or paddleboarding.

days.title: Travel to Neil Island
days.description: Morning ferry to Neil Island (approx. 1.5 hours). Check into your resort. Afternoon at Sitapur Beach for a serene experience. Visit the local village market.

days.title: Neil Island Exploration
days.description: Morning boat trip to Bharatpur Beach and Lakshmanpur Beach. Snorkeling at the coral reefs. Afternoon at Ramnagar Beach. Visit the natural rock formations.

days.title: Neil Island Relaxation
days.description: Full-day at leisure. Explore the island's hidden gems like the caves and waterfalls. Optional activities like cycling or village walks.

days.title: Return to Port Blair
days.description: Morning ferry back to Port Blair. Afternoon at Chidiya Tapu for sunset views and nature trails. Evening at the local seafood market.

days.title: Departure
days.description: Morning at leisure for last-minute shopping or sightseeing. Transfer to the airport for departure.

INBOUND-17.overview: Explore the vibrant culture, royal heritage, and golden deserts of Rajasthan on this 8-day journey through Jaipur, Jodhpur, Jaisalmer, and Udaipur. Experience palaces, forts, camel safaris, and local traditions.

days.title: Arrival in Jaipur
days.description: Arrive in Jaipur, the Pink City. Check into your heritage hotel. Evening visit to the local market for shopping and dinner at a traditional Rajasthani restaurant.

days.title: Jaipur - The Pink City
days.description: Full-day sightseeing: Amber Fort, Hawa Mahal, City Palace, Jantar Mantar, and local bazaars. Enjoy a cultural evening with folk dance and music.

days.title: Jaipur to Jodhpur
days.description: Morning drive to Jodhpur (approx. 6 hours). Visit Mehrangarh Fort and Jaswant Thada. Explore the Blue City’s old streets and local markets. Overnight stay.

days.title: Jodhpur - The Blue City
