days.description: Visit Umaid Bhawan Palace museum and local artisan workshops. Afternoon free for leisure or optional activities like zip-lining or heritage walks.

days.title: Jodhpur to Jaisalmer
days.description: Morning drive to Jaisalmer (approx. 5 hours). Visit Jaisalmer Fort, Patwon Ki Haveli, and local markets. Enjoy a sunset camel ride in the Thar Desert.

days.title: Jaisalmer - The Golden City
days.description: Full-day desert adventure: camel safari, dune bashing, and overnight stay in a desert camp under the stars with cultural performances.

days.title: Jaisalmer to Udaipur
days.description: Morning drive to Udaipur (approx. 7 hours). Visit City Palace, Jagdish Temple, and enjoy a sunset boat ride on Lake Pichola. Dinner at a rooftop restaurant.

days.title: Departure from Udaipur
days.description: Morning free for last-minute shopping or sightseeing. Transfer to the airport for departure.

INBOUND-18.overview: Experience the royal heritage of Rajasthan with this 8-day tour covering Jaipur, Jodhpur, Jaisalmer, and Udaipur. Explore majestic palaces, desert landscapes, and vibrant culture.

days.title: Arrival in Jaipur
days.description: Arrive in Jaipur, the Pink City. Check into your heritage hotel. Evening visit to Jantar Mantar and Hawa Mahal. Overnight stay in Jaipur.

days.title: Jaipur Exploration
days.description: Full day tour of Jaipur: Amber Fort, City Palace, and local markets. Evening at leisure. Overnight stay in Jaipur.

days.title: Jaipur to Jodhpur
days.description: Morning drive to Jodhpur (approx. 6 hours). Visit Mehrangarh Fort and Jaswant Thada. Evening at leisure. Overnight stay in Jodhpur.

days.title: Jodhpur Exploration
days.description: Explore Umaid Bhawan Palace and local markets. Evening at leisure. Overnight stay in Jodhpur.

days.title: Jodhpur to Jaisalmer
days.description: Morning drive to Jaisalmer (approx. 5 hours). Visit Jaisalmer Fort and local markets. Evening at leisure. Overnight stay in Jaisalmer.

days.title: Jaisalmer Desert Safari
days.description: Full day desert safari with camel ride, cultural performances, and stargazing. Overnight stay in Jaisalmer.

days.title: Jaisalmer to Udaipur
days.description: Morning drive to Udaipur (approx. 7 hours). Visit City Palace and local markets. Evening boat ride on Lake Pichola. Overnight stay in Udaipur.

days.title: Departure from Udaipur
days.description: Morning at leisure. Afternoon transfer to Udaipur airport/railway station for departure.

INBOUND-19.overview: Experience the breathtaking beauty of Uttarakhand with this 8-day tour covering hill stations, holy cities, and serene lakes. From the colonial charm of Mussoorie to the spiritual aura of Haridwar and Rishikesh, this itinerary offers a perfect blend of adventure, culture, and relaxation.

days.title: Arrival in Mussoorie
days.description: Arrive in Mussoorie, the Queen of Hills, and check into your hotel. Enjoy the cool mountain air and relax while soaking in the panoramic views of the Himalayas. Spend the evening exploring the Mall Road, visiting local cafes, and enjoying the vibrant atmosphere.

days.title: Mussoorie sightseeing
days.description: Visit Kempty Falls, a picturesque waterfall surrounded by lush greenery. Explore Gun Hill, the second-highest point in Mussoorie, accessible by ropeway, offering stunning views of the Doon Valley. In the afternoon, visit the historic Christ Church and stroll through the charming town.

days.title: Drive to Haridwar
days.description: Travel to Haridwar, one of the seven holiest cities in Hinduism. Visit Har Ki Pauri, the sacred ghat on the banks of the Ganges, and witness the evening Ganga Aarti. Explore the bustling markets and enjoy local street food like aloo puri and jalebi.

days.title: Haridwar to Rishikesh
days.description: Drive to Rishikesh, the yoga capital of the world, and visit the iconic Lakshman Jhula and Ram Jhula bridges. Explore the Beatles Ashram, a historic site associated with the famous band. In the evening, attend the Ganga Aarti at Triveni Ghat.

days.title: Rishikesh adventure
days.description: Engage in thrilling adventure activities like white-water rafting on the Ganges or a guided trekking experience. Visit the ancient Neelkanth Mahadev Temple, perched atop a hill with stunning views. Relax in the evening by the riverfront or explore local cafes and shops.

days.title: Drive to Auli
days.description: Travel to Auli, a pristine hill station known for its apple orchards and panoramic Himalayan views. Visit the Auli Artificial Lake and enjoy a cable car ride to get a bird's-eye view of the valley. Spend the evening exploring the serene surroundings and local markets.

days.title: Auli to Nainital
days.description: Drive to Nainital, a charming lakeside town nestled in the Kumaon hills. Visit Naini Lake, take a boat ride, and explore the bustling Mall Road. Visit the Naina Devi Temple, dedicated to the goddess Naina Devi, and enjoy the scenic beauty of the town.

days.title: Departure from Nainital
days.description: Spend the morning exploring the local markets for souvenirs like handmade crafts and woolen items. After breakfast, check out and depart for your onward journey, carrying memories of Uttarakhand's stunning landscapes and spiritual vibrancy.

INBOUND-20.overview: A 10-day journey through the scenic hill stations of Uttarakhand, featuring Mussoorie's colonial charm, Rishikesh's spiritual vibes, Auli's snow-capped vistas, and Nainital's serene lakes. The tour blends adventure, culture, and relaxation amidst the Himalayas.

days.title: Arrival in Mussoorie
days.description: Arrive in Dehradun, transfer to Mussoorie (1.5-hour drive). Check-in at a heritage hotel. Evening stroll at Mall Road, enjoy local cafes, and witness the sunset at Kempty Falls.

days.title: Explore Mussoorie
days.description: Morning visit to Gun Hill (cable car ride), Kempty Falls, and Company Garden. Afternoon explore Lal Tibba and Camels Back Road. Evening enjoy the panoramic views from Mussoorie Lake.

days.title: Mussoorie to Rishikesh
days.description: Drive to Rishikesh (4-5 hours). Visit Triveni Ghat for the Ganga Aarti, Parmarth Niketan, and Beatles Ashram. Evening riverfront walk and yoga session by the Ganges.

days.title: Adventure in Rishikesh
days.description: Morning white-water rafting (Grade II-III) on the Ganges. Visit Neelkanth Mahadev Temple (32km drive). Evening explore local markets and try Ayurvedic therapies.

days.title: Rishikesh to Auli
days.description: Drive to Joshimath (2.5 hours), then take the cable car to Auli (30 mins). Check-in at a mountain resort. Afternoon visit Auli Lake and enjoy the apple orchards. Evening bonfire with local music.

days.title: Auli - Skiing & Scenic Views
days.description: Morning skiing or ropeway ride to Auli’s highest point (3,050m) for Himalayan views. Visit Chenab Lake and Nanda Devi National Park viewpoint. Evening relax at the resort.

days.title: Auli to Nainital
days.description: Drive to Nainital via Ranikhet (6-7 hours). Stop at Kausani for tea and Himalayan vistas. Check-in at a lakeside hotel. Evening boat ride on Naini Lake and Mall Road exploration.

days.title: Nainital - Lakes & Peaks
days.description: Morning visit Naina Devi Temple and Snow View Point (cable car). Afternoon explore Eco Cave Gardens and Governor’s House. Evening enjoy local Kumaoni cuisine at a rooftop restaurant.

days.title: Nainital - Day Trip to Binsar
days.description: Full-day excursion to Binsar Wildlife Sanctuary (2.5-hour drive). Spot Himalayan birds, visit Zero Point for 360° mountain views, and return to Nainital for a farewell dinner.

days.title: Departure from Nainital
days.description: Morning free for last-minute shopping or a lakeside walk. Transfer to Pantnagar Airport (1-hour drive) or Kathgodam Railway Station for onward journey.

INBOUND-22.overview: A 10-day cultural and wildlife journey through Gujarat, exploring historic cities, sacred sites, and the iconic Gir National Park.

days.title: Arrival in Ahmedabad
days.description: Arrive in Ahmedabad, check into your hotel, and explore the local markets and heritage sites like the Sidi Saiyyed Mosque and Jama Masjid.

days.title: Ahmedabad Sightseeing
days.description: Visit the Sabarmati Ashram, Gandhi Smarak Sangrahalaya, and the Adalaj Stepwell. Explore the old city with its pol houses and the Swaminarayan Temple.

days.title: Travel to Bhuj
days.description: Morning flight or train to Bhuj. Explore the Aina Mahal, Prag Mahal, and the Swaminaray Temple. Visit the local markets for traditional Kutch embroidery.

days.title: Bhuj to Dwarka
days.description: Travel to Dwarka, one of the Char Dham pilgrimage sites. Visit the Dwarkadhish Temple, Bet Dwarka Island, and the Nageshwar Jyotirlinga.

days.title: Dwarka to Somnath
days.description: Drive to Somnath, visit the Somnath Temple, the Triveni Sangam, and the Somnath Beach. Explore the nearby Laxmi Narayan Temple.

days.title: Somnath to Gir National Park
days.description: Morning drive to Gir National Park. Afternoon safari to spot Asiatic lions, leopards, and other wildlife. Stay overnight in a forest lodge.

days.title: Gir National Park Safari
days.description: Full-day safari in Gir National Park with opportunities for birdwatching and exploring the local flora and fauna. Evening at leisure.

days.title: Gir to Rajkot
days.description: Drive to Rajkot, visit the Watson Museum, Rashtriyashala, and the Swaminarayan Temple. Explore the local markets and enjoy Gujarati cuisine.

days.title: Rajkot to Vadodara
days.description: Travel to Vadodara, visit the Laxmi Vilas Palace, EME Temple, and the Sayaji Baug. Explore the local art scene and handicrafts.

days.title: Departure from Vadodara
days.description: Morning at leisure for last-minute shopping or sightseeing. Transfer to the airport for departure.

INBOUND-25.overview: An 8-day journey through Karnataka's elevated landscapes, from bustling Bengaluru to historic Hampi, featuring lush coffee plantations in Coorg, misty mountains in Chikmagalur, and ancient cave temples in Badami.

days.title: Arrival in Bengaluru
days.description: Arrive in Bengaluru, check into a hotel, and explore the city's modern and colonial landmarks like Bengaluru Palace and Lalbagh Botanical Garden. Enjoy a welcome dinner at a local restaurant.

days.title: Bengaluru to Mysore
days.description: Drive to Mysore (3-4 hours). Visit the Mysore Palace, St. Philomena's Church, and Chamundi Hill. Explore the vibrant Devaraja Market for souvenirs. Evening at leisure.

days.title: Mysore to Coorg
days.description: Drive to Coorg (4-5 hours). En route, stop at Srirangapatna and Ranganathittu Bird Sanctuary. Arrive in Coorg, check into a plantation stay, and explore local coffee and spice estates.

days.title: Coorg Exploration
days.description: Full day in Coorg: Visit Abbey Falls, Raja's Seat, and the Tibetan Golden Temple. Optional activities include trekking or a plantation tour. Enjoy a traditional Kodava meal.

days.title: Coorg to Chikmagalur
days.description: Drive to Chikmagalur (5-6 hours). En route, stop at Shivanasamudra Falls. Arrive in Chikmagalur, check into a homestay, and relax amidst the misty mountains.

days.title: Chikmagalur to Hampi
days.description: Drive to Hampi (4-5 hours). Explore the UNESCO-listed ruins of the Vijayanagara Empire, including the Virupaksha Temple, Lotus Mahal, and Hampi Bazaar. Sunset at Matanga Hill.

days.title: Hampi to Badami
days.description: Drive to Badami (3-4 hours). Visit the ancient Badami Cave Temples, Agastya Lake, and the historic Badami Fort. Explore the local handicrafts and sandstone cliffs.

days.title: Departure from Badami
days.description: Morning visit to Pattadakal (UNESCO site) or Aihole (ancient temples). Drive to the nearest airport/railway station for departure.

INBOUND-28.overview: Experience the pristine beauty of Lakshadweep with this 7-day island-hopping tour. Explore turquoise lagoons, coral reefs, and serene beaches while enjoying water sports and local culture.

days.title: Arrival in Agatti Island
days.description: Arrive at Agatti Airport and transfer to your resort. Relax on the white sandy beach and enjoy a welcome drink while soaking in the island vibes.

days.title: Agatti – Snorkeling & Beach Walk
days.description: Embark on a snorkeling adventure at the coral reefs near Agatti. Later, take a leisurely beach walk and visit the local fish market to see the day's catch.

days.title: Agatti to Bangaram Island
days.description: Take a speedboat to Bangaram Island, known for its untouched beauty. Spend the day swimming, sunbathing, and exploring the lagoon by kayak.

days.title: Bangaram – Dolphin Sighting & Picnic
days.description: Join a boat tour for dolphin sighting and visit the nearby uninhabited Parali Island for a picnic. Enjoy snorkeling and beach games in the afternoon.

days.title: Bangaram to Kadmat Island
days.description: Travel to Kadmat Island and check into your beachfront resort. Spend the evening strolling along the shore and watching the sunset over the Arabian Sea.

days.title: Kadmat – Glass-Bottom Boat Ride
days.description: Take a glass-bottom boat ride to explore the vibrant coral reefs without getting wet. Later, try kayaking or paddleboarding in the calm waters.

days.title: Departure from Agatti
days.description: After breakfast, transfer to Agatti Airport for your departure. Carry memories of Lakshadweep’s pristine beaches and marine life.

INBOUND-29.overview: A 10-day immersive journey through the pristine islands of Lakshadweep, featuring pristine beaches, vibrant marine life, and serene lagoons. Explore Agatti, Bangaram, Kadmat, and Kavaratti with activities like snorkeling, kayaking, and cultural experiences.

days.title: Arrival in Agatti Island
days.description: Arrive at Agatti Airport. Transfer to the resort/hotel. Relax and acclimatize. Evening stroll along the beach. Overnight stay in Agatti.

days.title: Explore Agatti Island
days.description: Morning: Visit the local fish market and village. Afternoon: Snorkeling at the coral reefs. Evening: Sunset cruise. Overnight in Agatti.

days.title: Boat Transfer to Bangaram Island
days.description: Morning: Boat ride to Bangaram Island (approx. 2-3 hours). Check-in at Bangaram Island Resort. Afternoon: Relax on the pristine beach. Evening: Bonfire and stargazing. Overnight on Bangaram.

days.title: Bangaram Island Exploration
days.description: Morning: Snorkeling and glass-bottom boat ride. Afternoon: Kayaking or paddleboarding. Evening: Beachside dinner. Overnight on Bangaram.

days.title: Boat Transfer to Kadmat Island
days.description: Morning: Boat ride to Kadmat Island (approx. 2 hours). Check-in at Kadmat Island Resort. Afternoon: Relax on the sandy beaches. Evening: Visit the local lighthouse. Overnight on Kadmat.

days.title: Kadmat Island Adventures
days.description: Morning: Snorkeling at the coral reefs. Afternoon: Deep-sea fishing or island hopping. Evening: Cultural dance performance. Overnight on Kadmat.

days.title: Boat Transfer to Kavaratti
days.description: Morning: Boat ride to Kavaratti (approx. 3 hours). Check-in at Kavaratti Island Resort. Afternoon: Visit the Marine Aquarium and Ujra Mosque. Evening: Local market exploration. Overnight in Kavaratti.

days.title: Kavaratti Island Highlights
days.description: Morning: Snorkeling at the lagoon. Afternoon: Kayaking or paddleboarding. Evening: Sunset at the beach. Overnight in Kavaratti.

days.title: Cultural and Leisure Day
days.description: Morning: Visit the local handicraft centers. Afternoon: Relax at the beach or indulge in water sports. Evening: Farewell dinner with cultural performances. Overnight in Kavaratti.

days.title: Departure from Kavaratti
days.description: Morning: Check-out and transfer to Kavaratti Airport. Depart for your next destination.

INBOUND-30.overview: This 7-day tour explores the cultural and historical gems of South India, starting in the serene French-colonial town of Pondicherry, followed by the ancient coastal town of Mahabalipuram, and concluding in the bustling metropolis of Chennai. Experience tranquil beaches, UNESCO-listed temples, and vibrant local markets while immersing in the region's rich heritage.

days.title: Arrival in Pondicherry
days.description: Arrive in Pondicherry and check into a heritage hotel in the French Quarter. Spend the evening strolling along the promenade, visiting the iconic Promenade Beach, and enjoying a relaxed dinner at a local café.

days.title: Pondicherry sightseeing
days.description: Explore Pondicherry’s colonial architecture with visits to the Aurobindo Ashram, Sri Aurobindo Temple, and the serene Auroville community. End the day with a visit to the vibrant Paradise Beach for sunset views.

days.title: Pondicherry to Mahabalipuram
days.description: Drive to Mahabalipuram, stopping en route at the Gingee Fort for panoramic views. Upon arrival, visit the Shore Temple and the Five Rathas, marveling at the 7th-century rock-cut architecture.

days.title: Mahabalipuram exploration
days.description: Spend the day exploring Mahabalipuram’s UNESCO-listed monuments, including the Arjuna’s Penance relief and the Krishna’s Butterball. Relax at the golden Mahabalipuram Beach in the evening.

days.title: Mahabalipuram to Chennai
days.description: Travel to Chennai, visiting the DakshinaChitra Heritage Village to experience South Indian rural life. In Chennai, explore the historic Fort St. George and Marina Beach.

days.title: Chennai cultural tour
days.description: Visit the Kapaleeshwarar Temple and the Parthasarathy Temple, showcasing Dravidian temple architecture. Enjoy a traditional South Indian lunch and explore the bustling markets of T Nagar.

days.title: Departure from Chennai
days.description: After breakfast, transfer to Chennai International Airport for departure. The tour concludes with fond memories of South India’s rich culture and heritage.

INBOUND-33.overview: Discover the serene coastal beauty and French colonial charm of Pondicherry over six days. Explore pristine beaches, vibrant ashrams, historic landmarks, and local culture through a mix of relaxation, adventure, and spiritual experiences.

days.title: Arrival in Pondicherry
days.description: Arrive in Pondicherry, check into your hotel or heritage stay. Spend the evening strolling along the Promenade Beach, watching the sunset, and enjoying the French Quarter's architecture. Visit the iconic Mahatma Gandhi Statue and enjoy a welcome dinner at a local café.

days.title: French Quarter & Cultural Exploration
days.description: Morning: Explore the French Quarter on foot, visiting landmarks like the Basilica of the Sacred Heart of Jesus, Aurobindo Ashram, and the French War Memorial. Afternoon: Visit the Pondicherry Museum and the nearby Botanical Garden. Evening: Enjoy a cultural performance or visit the Sri Aurobindo Handmade Paper Factory.

days.title: Auroville & Matrimandir Visit
days.description: Full-day excursion to Auroville, the international township. Visit the Matrimandir and its gardens, explore the Auroville Visitor Center, and interact with residents. Return to Pondicherry in the evening and relax at the beach.

days.title: Beach Day & Water Sports
days.description: Morning: Relax at Paradise Beach or Serenity Beach. Afternoon: Try water sports like kayaking, paddleboarding, or surfing at Serenity Beach. Evening: Enjoy a seafood dinner at a beachside restaurant and watch the sunset.

days.title: Chunnambar Backwaters & Local Villages
days.description: Morning: Take a boat ride through the Chunnambar Backwaters, exploring mangroves and local villages. Afternoon: Visit the Chunnambar Boat House and enjoy a traditional Tamil lunch. Evening: Explore the local markets for souvenirs and handicrafts.

days.title: Departure
days.description: Morning: Visit the Arikamedu archaeological site or enjoy a final walk along the Promenade. Check out and depart from Pondicherry. Optional: Stop at a café for a quick bite before heading to the airport or railway station.

INBOUND-35.overview: A 7-day immersive tour in Goa, blending animation workshops, cultural exploration, and scenic relaxation. Participants will engage in hands-on animation activities, visit iconic landmarks, and enjoy Goa's vibrant beaches and cuisine.

days.title: Arrival & Welcome to Goa
days.description: Arrive in Goa, check into a beachside resort. Evening welcome dinner with traditional Goan cuisine. Light orientation walk to the local market.

days.title: Animation Fundamentals Workshop
days.description: Morning session: Introduction to animation principles. Afternoon: Hands-on practice with 2D animation tools. Evening: Sunset at Palolem Beach.

days.title: Cultural Goa & Animation Inspiration
days.description: Visit Old Goa’s churches and Latin Quarter. Afternoon: Sketching and storyboarding sessions inspired by Goan architecture. Evening: Cashew Feni tasting.

days.title: 3D Animation & Beach Relaxation
days.description: Full-day 3D animation workshop. Evening: Bonfire and beachside networking under the stars.

days.title: Animation Project Development
days.description: Group work on mini animation projects. Afternoon: Visit Dudhsagar Waterfalls. Evening: Local seafood feast.

days.title: Animation Showcase & Free Time
days.description: Morning: Finalize and present animation projects. Afternoon: Free time for beach activities or shopping in Anjuna. Evening: Farewell party.

days.title: Departure
days.description: Check out and transfer to the airport for departure.

INBOUND-37.overview: A rejuvenating 10-day tour through Goa, blending serene beaches, vibrant culture, and wellness retreats. Experience tranquil sunsets, Ayurvedic therapies, and local flavors while exploring Goa’s diverse landscapes and heritage.

days.title: Arrival in Goa – Welcome to Paradise
days.description: Arrive at Goa’s international airport or railway station and transfer to your beachfront resort in North Goa. Relax and unwind with a welcome drink and light refreshments as you settle into your accommodation.

days.title: North Goa Beaches – Anjuna & Vagator
days.description: Spend the day exploring the iconic beaches of Anjuna and Vagator. Enjoy water sports like parasailing or jet skiing, and visit the famous Chapora Fort for panoramic views of the Arabian Sea.

days.title: Ayurvedic Wellness Retreat
days.description: Begin a day of holistic healing with an Ayurvedic consultation followed by a full-body massage and herbal steam therapy. Enjoy a nutritious Ayurvedic lunch and unwind in the serene retreat setting.

days.title: Old Goa Exploration – Churches & History
days.description: Visit the UNESCO-listed Basilica of Bom Jesus and Se Cathedral, marveling at Portuguese architecture and the sacred relic of St. Francis Xavier. Explore the Latin Quarter and its colonial charm.

days.title: Spice Plantation Tour – Savoi & Sahakari
days.description: Take a scenic drive through lush spice plantations in Ponda, learning about Goa’s spice trade. Enjoy a traditional Goan lunch and witness the processing of cashews and spices firsthand.

days.title: South Goa Beaches – Palolem & Colva
days.description: Discover the quieter beaches of South Goa, where golden sands meet swaying palms. Relax with a beachside massage or try dolphin-watching in Palolem before enjoying fresh seafood for dinner.

days.title: Yoga & Meditation by the Sea
days.description: Join a sunrise yoga session on a secluded beach, followed by guided meditation to rejuvenate the mind and body. Spend the afternoon exploring local markets for handmade souvenirs.

days.title: Cruise & Sunset Party – Mandovi River
days.description: Embark on a sunset cruise along the Mandovi River, enjoying live music and scenic views. Later, join a lively beach party in Baga or Candolim with dancing and Goan cuisine.

days.title: Cultural Immersion – Fontainhas & Feni Tasting
days.description: Wander through Fontainhas, Goa’s Latin Quarter, with its colorful Portuguese villas and art galleries. End the day with a feni tasting session, sampling this traditional Goan spirit.

days.title: Departure – Fond Farewell
days.description: After breakfast, check out and transfer to the airport or railway station for your onward journey. Take home cherished memories of Goa’s beauty, culture, and tranquility.

INBOUND-38.overview: A 10-day immersive tour of Jammu & Kashmir, exploring the serene lakes, lush meadows, and pristine valleys of Srinagar, Gulmarg, and Pahalgam. Experience local culture, adventure activities, and breathtaking landscapes.

days.title: Arrival in Srinagar
days.description: Arrive in Srinagar, the summer capital of Jammu & Kashmir. Check into a houseboat on Dal Lake. Evening shikara ride on the lake and explore local markets.

days.title: Explore Srinagar
days.description: Visit Mughal Gardens (Shalimar Bagh, Nishat Bagh, and Chashme Shahi). Explore Hazratbal Shrine and local handicraft markets. Overnight stay in a houseboat.

days.title: Srinagar to Gulmarg
days.description: Morning drive to Gulmarg (approx. 2.5 hours). Enjoy the scenic cable car ride to Kongdoori Mountain. Explore the meadows and play golf or try skiing (seasonal). Overnight stay in Gulmarg.

days.title: Gulmarg Exploration
days.description: Full day to explore Gulmarg’s natural beauty. Visit Apharwat Peak (via cable car), enjoy horseback riding, or relax in the alpine meadows. Overnight stay in Gulmarg.

days.title: Gulmarg to Pahalgam
days.description: Morning drive to Pahalgam (approx. 4.5 hours). Visit Betaab Valley and explore the Lidder River. Overnight stay in Pahalgam.

days.title: Pahalgam Adventure
days.description: Full day of adventure activities: horse riding, trekking to Baisaran Valley, or white-water rafting on the Lidder River. Overnight stay in Pahalgam.

days.title: Pahalgam to Srinagar
days.description: Morning drive back to Srinagar (approx. 4.5 hours). Visit Shankaracharya Temple and local markets. Overnight stay in a houseboat.

days.title: Srinagar Leisure Day
days.description: Relax with a shikara ride, visit local cafes, or explore the floating vegetable market. Optional: Day trip to Wular Lake. Overnight stay in a houseboat.

days.title: Cultural Exploration
days.description: Visit local artisans in Sonamarg or explore the historic Hari Parbat Fort. Evening cultural show featuring Kashmiri dance and music. Overnight stay in a houseboat.

days.title: Departure from Srinagar
days.description: Morning free for last-minute shopping or sightseeing. Transfer to the airport for departure.

INBOUND-39.overview: Experience the breathtaking beauty and rich culture of Jammu & Kashmir with this 7-day itinerary. Starting in Srinagar, explore serene lakes, lush gardens, and historic Mughal architecture. Enjoy houseboat stays, local cuisine, and scenic drives through the Himalayas.

days.title: Arrival in Srinagar
days.description: Arrive in Srinagar, the summer capital of Jammu & Kashmir. Check into a houseboat on Dal Lake or a lakeside hotel. Explore the local markets of Lal Chowk and enjoy a traditional Kashmiri dinner.

days.title: Srinagar City Tour
days.description: Visit the iconic Mughal Gardens: Shalimar Bagh, Nishat Bagh, and Chashme Shahi. Explore the historic Hari Parbat Fort and enjoy a shikara ride on Dal Lake. Evening at leisure to relax.

days.title: Srinagar to Gulmarg
days.description: Drive to Gulmarg (about 2.5 hours), known as the 'Meadow of Flowers.' Enjoy a cable car ride to the summit for panoramic views of the Himalayas. Explore the golf course and local tea houses.

days.title: Gulmarg to Pahalgam
days.description: Travel to Pahalgam (about 5 hours) via scenic routes. Visit the Betaab Valley and enjoy a pony ride along the Lidder River. Stay overnight in a houseboat or hotel.

days.title: Pahalgam Exploration
days.description: Explore the Aru Valley and Chandanwari. Enjoy a short trek or nature walk. Visit the Mamaleshwar Temple and relax by the river. Evening at leisure.

days.title: Pahalgam to Srinagar
days.description: Return to Srinagar (about 3 hours). Visit the Hazratbal Shrine and enjoy a farewell dinner with local Kashmiri Wazwan cuisine.

days.title: Departure from Srinagar
days.description: Morning at leisure for last-minute shopping or sightseeing. Transfer to the airport for departure.

INBOUND-40.overview: A luxurious 7-day journey aboard the Maharaja's Express, exploring the royal heritage and cultural treasures of India. The itinerary includes visits to Jaipur's palaces, Ranthambore's wildlife, Agra's iconic Taj Mahal, Orchha's medieval charm, Varanasi's spiritual essence, and Delhi's historical grandeur.

days.title: Arrival in Jaipur
days.description: Arrive in Jaipur, the Pink City, and board the Maharaja's Express. Enjoy a welcome drink and light refreshments. Proceed to the hotel for check-in and rest. In the evening, attend a cultural performance followed by dinner on board.

days.title: Jaipur - The Pink City
days.description: Morning visit to the Amber Fort with an elephant ride (optional). Explore the City Palace and Jantar Mantar, an astronomical observatory. Afternoon sightseeing at Hawa Mahal and local markets for handicrafts. Evening return to the train for dinner and onward journey to Ranthambore.

days.title: Ranthambore - Wildlife Safari
days.description: Morning and afternoon safaris in Ranthambore National Park to spot tigers and other wildlife. Visit the historic Ranthambore Fort. Evening at leisure on board the train. Overnight journey to Agra.

days.title: Agra - The City of Taj
days.description: Morning visit to the Taj Mahal at sunrise. Explore Agra Fort and Fatehpur Sikri (if time permits). Afternoon at leisure or optional activities like a visit to the local marble workshops. Evening return to the train for dinner and journey to Orchha.

days.title: Orchha - The Hidden Gem
days.description: Morning visit to Orchha's historic sites including Jahangir Mahal, Ram Raja Temple, and Chhatris. Afternoon at leisure to explore the local markets or relax. Evening return to the train for dinner and onward journey to Varanasi.

days.title: Varanasi - The Spiritual Capital
days.description: Morning boat ride on the Ganges River to witness the sunrise and sacred rituals. Visit the Kashi Vishwanath Temple and Dashashwamedh Ghat. Afternoon at leisure to explore the old city or attend a Ganga Aarti ceremony. Evening return to the train for dinner and journey to Delhi.

days.title: Departure from Delhi
days.description: Morning arrival in Delhi. Disembark and proceed to the hotel for freshening up. Visit the Qutub Minar, Humayun's Tomb, or India Gate (optional). Afternoon at leisure for last-minute shopping or sightseeing. Evening transfer to the airport for departure.

INBOUND-41.overview: A 6-day cultural and historical journey through South India, exploring ancient temples, royal heritage, and serene backwaters, from Mysore's palaces to Cochin's colonial charm and back to Bengaluru.

days.title: Arrival in Mysore
days.description: Arrive in Mysore, check into your hotel, and explore the city's royal heritage. Visit the Mysore Palace, a stunning example of Indo-Saracenic architecture, and stroll through the vibrant Devaraja Market. Evening: Relax at the hotel or explore local cafes.

days.title: Mysore to Kanchipuram
days.description: Morning: Travel to Kanchipuram (approx. 5 hours). Visit the Ekambareswarar Temple, one of the Pancha Bhoota Stalas, dedicated to Lord Shiva. Afternoon: Explore the Kailasanathar Temple and the historic Kamakshi Amman Temple. Evening: Stroll through the silk-weaving districts and enjoy local South Indian cuisine.

days.title: Kanchipuram to Thanjavur
days.description: Morning: Travel to Thanjavur (approx. 4 hours). Visit the Brihadeeswarar Temple, a UNESCO World Heritage Site and a masterpiece of Chola architecture. Afternoon: Explore the Thanjavur Maratha Palace and the Saraswathi Mahal Library. Evening: Enjoy a traditional Bharatanatyam dance performance.

days.title: Thanjavur to Cochin
days.description: Morning: Travel to Cochin (approx. 6 hours). Visit the Fort Kochi area, including the Chinese Fishing Nets, Jewish Synagogue, and Mattancherry Palace. Afternoon: Explore the spice markets and enjoy a Kathakali dance performance in the evening.

days.title: Cochin to Chertala
days.description: Morning: Travel to Chertala (approx. 2 hours). Enjoy a serene backwater cruise along the Vembanad Lake, visiting local villages and spotting birdlife. Afternoon: Relax at a lakeside resort or explore the Alleppey town. Evening: Return to Cochin for an overnight stay.

days.title: Departure from Bengaluru
days.description: Morning: Travel to Bengaluru (approx. 6 hours). Visit the Bangalore Palace or ISKCON Temple for a final taste of South Indian culture. Afternoon: Depart from Bengaluru.

INBOUND-43.overview: Embark on an 8-day journey through India's royal heritage, from the wildlife of Ranthambore to the iconic Taj Mahal, vibrant palaces of Rajasthan, and ancient caves of Maharashtra. This tour blends history, culture, and adventure across six iconic cities.

days.title: Arrival in Sawai Madhopur
days.description: Arrive at Sawai Madhopur, gateway to Ranthambore National Park. Check into a heritage hotel and relax before an evening jungle safari to spot Bengal tigers and other wildlife.

days.title: Sawai Madhopur – Ranthambore Safari
days.description: Enjoy two safaris in Ranthambore National Park, exploring its dense forests and historic ruins. Spot tigers, leopards, and diverse bird species amid scenic landscapes.

days.title: Agra – Taj Mahal & Fort
days.description: Travel to Agra and visit the breathtaking Taj Mahal at sunrise. Explore Agra Fort and the serene Mehtab Bagh for stunning views of the monument.

days.title: Jaipur – Royal Palaces & Markets
days.description: Discover Jaipur’s royal heritage with visits to Amber Fort, Hawa Mahal, and City Palace. Stroll through Johari Bazaar for vibrant textiles and jewelry.

days.title: Jaipur – Pink City Exploration
days.description: Explore Jantar Mantar, an astronomical marvel, and the grand Albert Hall Museum. Enjoy a cultural evening with traditional Rajasthani dance and music.

days.title: Udaipur – Lakes & Palaces
days.description: Visit the City Palace and serene Lake Pichola, taking a boat ride to Jag Mandir Island. Explore Jagdish Temple and stroll through the colorful bazaars.

days.title: Aurangabad – Ajanta & Ellora Caves
days.description: Travel to Aurangabad and explore the UNESCO-listed Ajanta and Ellora Caves, showcasing ancient rock-cut temples and Buddhist art.

days.title: Mumbai – Departure
days.description: Transfer to Mumbai for departure. If time permits, visit the Gateway of India or Colaba Causeway for last-minute shopping before heading to the airport.

INBOUND-45.overview: Explore the cultural and natural wonders of Madhya Pradesh on this 8-day tour, featuring heritage sites, hill stations, and wildlife sanctuaries. From the lakes of Bhopal to the serene landscapes of Pachmarhi, and the tiger reserves of Kanha, this itinerary offers a blend of history, nature, and adventure.

days.title: Arrival in Bhopal – Lakes and Heritage
days.description: Arrive in Bhopal, the capital of Madhya Pradesh, known as the 'City of Lakes.' Visit the iconic Upper Lake and Lower Lake, and explore the historic Taj-ul-Masajid, one of India's largest mosques. Enjoy a cultural evening with local cuisine at a traditional restaurant.

days.title: Bhopal to Pachmarhi – Hill Station Arrival
days.description: Travel to Pachmarhi, a scenic hill station nestled in the Satpura Range. Visit the Pandava Caves, believed to be the hiding place of the Pandavas from the Mahabharata. Explore the charming town and enjoy the cool climate and lush greenery.

days.title: Pachmarhi – Waterfalls and Viewpoints
days.description: Discover the natural beauty of Pachmarhi with visits to the stunning Bee Falls and Rajat Prapat (Silver Falls). Hike to the highest point, Dhupgarh, for breathtaking sunrise views. Explore the ancient Jata Shankar Cave and enjoy a peaceful evening in the hills.

days.title: Pachmarhi to Kanha – Wildlife Safari Prep
days.description: Drive to Kanha National Park, one of India's premier tiger reserves. En route, stop at the historic town of Mandla to visit the ancient Ghanteshwar Temple. Arrive at Kanha and prepare for the safari with a briefing on park rules and wildlife spotting tips.

days.title: Kanha – Morning and Evening Safaris
days.description: Embark on thrilling jeep safaris into Kanha National Park to spot Bengal tigers, leopards, and other wildlife. Visit the Kanha Museum to learn about the park's flora and fauna. Enjoy the serene beauty of the meadows and sal forests during the safaris.

days.title: Kanha – Nature Walks and Villages
days.description: Take a guided nature walk through the buffer zone of Kanha to observe smaller wildlife and birdlife. Visit nearby tribal villages to experience local culture and traditions. Relax at the resort and enjoy the natural surroundings.

days.title: Kanha to Jabalpur – Marble Rocks and Temples
days.description: Travel to Jabalpur, stopping at the stunning Dhuandhar Falls and the Bhedaghat Marble Rocks. Visit the ancient Rani Durgavati Museum and the historic Madan Mahal Fort. Enjoy a boat ride on the Narmada River for a scenic view of the marble cliffs.

days.title: Departure from Jabalpur
days.description: After breakfast, transfer to Jabalpur Airport or Railway Station for your onward journey. Reflect on the memorable experiences of wildlife, heritage, and nature from this tour of Madhya Pradesh.

INBOUND-47.overview: Experience the rich cultural heritage and royal grandeur of Maharashtra on this 8-day luxury train journey. Explore ancient caves, UNESCO World Heritage sites, and vibrant cities aboard the Deccan Odyssey.

days.title: Arrival in Mumbai – Gateway to India
days.description: Arrive in Mumbai and board the Deccan Odyssey. Enjoy a welcome drink and light refreshments before a guided tour of the iconic Gateway of India and Colaba Causeway.

days.title: Nashik – Wine & Spirituality
days.description: Visit the ancient Kalaram Temple and Sula Vineyards for a wine tasting experience. Explore the serene Godavari Ghat and local markets in Nashik.

days.title: Aurangabad – Cave Temples & History
days.description: Explore the UNESCO-listed Ellora Caves and Aurangabad Caves. Visit the Bibi Ka Maqbara, a miniature Taj Mahal, and the historic Daulatabad Fort.

days.title: Aurangabad – Ajanta & Ellora Exploration
days.description: Spend the day at the Ajanta Caves, known for their intricate Buddhist murals and carvings. Return to the train for a cultural evening with folk performances.

days.title: Kolhapur – Royal Heritage & Temples
days.description: Visit the Mahalaxmi Temple and the historic New Palace. Explore the vibrant bazaars and savor Kolhapur’s famous spicy cuisine.

days.title: Goa – Beaches & Portuguese Charm
days.description: Discover Goa’s colonial architecture in Old Goa and relax at a beachside resort. Enjoy a sunset cruise along the Mandovi River.

days.title: Sindhudurg – Forts & Coastal Views
days.description: Explore the majestic Sindhudurg Fort, built by Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj. Enjoy a scenic boat ride and local seafood delicacies.

days.title: Departure from Mumbai
days.description: Disembark the Deccan Odyssey after breakfast. Transfer to the airport for your onward journey, carrying memories of Maharashtra’s splendor.

INBOUND-48.overview: A 12-day journey through Madhya Pradesh, India, exploring its cultural heritage, wildlife, and scenic landscapes. Starting in Bhopal, the state capital, the tour covers UNESCO World Heritage Sites like Khajuraho and Orchha, wildlife sanctuaries like Kanha, and historic cities like Gwalior.

days.title: Arrival in Bhopal
days.description: Arrive in Bhopal, the capital of Madhya Pradesh. Check into your hotel and explore the city's lakes and colonial architecture. Visit the Upper Lake (Bada Talab) and the historic Taj-ul-Masajid. Evening at leisure.

days.title: Bhopal to Pachmarhi
days.description: Drive to Pachmarhi (220 km, ~5 hours), a hill station in the Satpura Range. Visit the Pandava Caves, Chauragarh Peak, and the picturesque Bee Falls. Stay overnight in Pachmarhi.

days.title: Explore Pachmarhi
days.description: Full day in Pachmarhi. Explore the Satpura National Park (optional jeep safari), visit the Apsara Falls, and the Rock Shelters of Bhimbetka (a UNESCO World Heritage Site). Return to the hotel for the night.

days.title: Pachmarhi to Kanha
days.description: Drive to Kanha National Park (250 km, ~6 hours). Check into the forest resort and relax. Evening at leisure or a short nature walk in the buffer zone.

days.title: Kanha National Park Safari
days.description: Full-day jeep safari in Kanha National Park to spot Bengal tigers, barasingha, and other wildlife. Explore the meadows and dense forests. Evening at leisure.

days.title: Kanha to Jabalpur
days.description: Drive to Jabalpur (160 km, ~4 hours). Visit the Dhuandhar Falls and the Marble Rocks at Bhedaghat. Explore the city's temples and markets. Stay overnight in Jabalpur.

days.title: Jabalpur to Khajuraho
days.description: Drive to Khajuraho (280 km, ~6 hours). Visit the Western Group of Temples (UNESCO World Heritage Site) in the evening. Stay overnight in Khajuraho.

days.title: Explore Khajuraho
days.description: Full day exploring the Eastern and Southern Groups of Khajuraho Temples. Visit the Khajuraho Dance Festival (if timing aligns) and local craft markets. Evening at leisure.

days.title: Khajuraho to Orchha
days.description: Drive to Orchha (180 km, ~4 hours). Visit the Orchha Fort Complex, Jahangir Mahal, and Ram Raja Temple. Stay overnight in Orchha.

days.title: Explore Orchha
days.description: Full day in Orchha. Visit the Chhatris (Cenotaphs) and Betwa River views. Optional boat ride on the Betwa River. Evening at leisure.

days.title: Orchha to Gwalior
days.description: Drive to Gwalior (120 km, ~3 hours). Visit the Gwalior Fort, Jai Vilas Palace, and Teli Ka Mandir. Stay overnight in Gwalior.

days.title: Departure from Gwalior
days.description: Morning at leisure for last-minute shopping or sightseeing. Transfer to the airport/railway station for departure.

INBOUND-49.overview: Embark on an 8-day journey through India's royal heritage, exploring the vibrant cities of the Deccan region. From the cultural grandeur of Udaipur to the majestic forts of Rajasthan and the iconic Taj Mahal, this tour offers a blend of history, architecture, and local experiences.

days.title: Arrival in Vadodara
days.description: Arrive in Vadodara, a cultural hub known for its royal past and vibrant arts scene. Spend the evening exploring the city's local markets and enjoying traditional Gujarati cuisine.

days.title: Vadodara to Udaipur
days.description: Travel to Udaipur, the 'City of Lakes,' and visit the majestic City Palace and Jag Mandir Island. Enjoy a sunset boat ride on Lake Pichola to soak in the scenic beauty.

days.title: Udaipur Exploration
days.description: Explore Udaipur's historic sites, including the Jagdish Temple and Saheliyon-ki-Bari. Experience local crafts at Shilpgram and savor a traditional Rajasthani dinner.

days.title: Udaipur to Jodhpur
days.description: Drive to Jodhpur, the 'Blue City,' and visit the Mehrangarh Fort with its stunning views. Explore the bustling markets of the old city and try local street food.

days.title: Jodhpur to Jaipur
days.description: Travel to Jaipur, the 'Pink City,' and explore the Amber Fort and Hawa Mahal. Spend the evening shopping for jewelry and textiles in local bazaars.

days.title: Jaipur Exploration
days.description: Visit the City Palace, Jantar Mantar, and Albert Hall Museum. Enjoy a cultural evening with traditional dance and music performances.

days.title: Jaipur to Agra
days.description: Journey to Agra and marvel at the iconic Taj Mahal at sunrise. Visit the Agra Fort and Mehtab Bagh for a stunning view of the Taj.

days.title: Agra to Delhi, Departure
days.description: Travel to Delhi and visit the Qutub Minar and Humayun's Tomb before heading to the airport for departure. Reflect on the journey's highlights over a farewell meal.

INBOUND-50.overview: Explore the scenic beauty and cultural richness of Himachal Pradesh with this 8-day itinerary covering Shimla, Manali, Kaza, and the mesmerizing Chandratal Lake. Experience colonial charm, adventure, and serene landscapes.

days.title: Arrival in Shimla
days.description: Arrive in Shimla, the capital of Himachal Pradesh. Check into your hotel and explore the Ridge and Mall Road. Enjoy the colonial architecture and panoramic views of the Himalayas. Overnight stay in Shimla.

days.title: Shimla Sightseeing
days.description: Visit Jakhu Temple, Christ Church, and Kufri for a day of sightseeing. Enjoy a toy train ride (if available) or a scenic drive. Relax in the evening and prepare for the journey to Manali. Overnight stay in Shimla.

days.title: Shimla to Manali Drive
days.description: Embark on a picturesque drive from Shimla to Manali via Kullu. Stop at scenic spots like Narkanda and Pandoh Dam. Arrive in Manali and explore the local markets. Overnight stay in Manali.

days.title: Manali Sightseeing
days.description: Visit Solang Valley for adventure activities like paragliding or ropeway ride. Explore Hadimba Temple and Old Manali. Enjoy the evening by the river. Overnight stay in Manali.

days.title: Manali to Kaza
days.description: Drive from Manali to Kaza via Rohtang Pass (weather permitting) and Gramphu. Experience the stunning landscapes of Lahaul and Spiti Valley. Arrive in Kaza and explore the local monastery. Overnight stay in Kaza.

days.title: Kaza to Chandratal Lake
days.description: Embark on a thrilling journey to Chandratal Lake, known as the 'Moon Lake.' Drive through scenic routes and stop at Key Monastery. Enjoy the serene beauty of the lake. Overnight stay in a tented camp near Chandratal.

days.title: Chandratal Lake Exploration
days.description: Spend the day exploring Chandratal Lake and its surroundings. Enjoy activities like trekking or photography. Relax by the lake and soak in the tranquility. Overnight stay in the same camp.

days.title: Departure from Kaza
days.description: After breakfast, drive back to Kaza for your onward journey. Depending on your travel plans, you may have time for a quick visit to the local market or a nearby monastery before departing.

INBOUND-51.overview: An 8-day wildlife and heritage journey through Maharashtra, exploring ancient caves, tiger reserves, and cultural landmarks. Experience the state's diverse landscapes from bustling Mumbai to serene Ramtek and thrilling Tadoba National Park.

days.title: Arrival in Mumbai – Gateway to India
days.description: Arrive in Mumbai, India's financial hub, and check into your hotel. Explore the iconic Gateway of India and take a ferry to the historic Elephanta Caves, known for its ancient rock-cut temples.

days.title: Mumbai – Colonial Heritage Walk
days.description: Visit the UNESCO-listed Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj Terminus and the colonial-era Flora Fountain. Stroll through the bustling Crawford Market and enjoy a traditional seafood lunch at a local café.

days.title: Aurangabad – Ajanta Caves Exploration
days.description: Travel to Aurangabad and explore the UNESCO-listed Ajanta Caves, featuring 2,000-year-old Buddhist murals and carvings. Later, visit the nearby Ellora Caves, showcasing rock-cut temples from the 6th to 11th centuries.

days.title: Ramtek – Wildlife & Temples
days.description: Drive to Ramtek and visit the ancient Ramtek Temple, dedicated to Lord Rama. Explore the serene Pench Tiger Reserve nearby, known for its lush forests and diverse wildlife, including tigers and leopards.

days.title: Tadoba – Jungle Safari Adventure
days.description: Head to Tadoba Andhari Tiger Reserve for a thrilling jeep safari, one of India's best tiger reserves. Spot Bengal tigers, sloth bears, and a variety of bird species in the dense teak forests.

days.title: Jalgaon – Ancient Caves & Forts
days.description: Visit the UNESCO-listed Ajanta Caves again for a deeper exploration, followed by a trip to the historic Daulatabad Fort near Aurangabad. Enjoy local Maharashtrian cuisine for dinner.

days.title: Nashik – Wine & Spirituality
days.description: Explore Nashik’s vineyards with a wine-tasting tour at Sula or York Winery. Visit the ancient Kalaram Temple and the serene Ramkund, a sacred bathing spot on the Godavari River.

days.title: Departure from Mumbai
days.description: After breakfast, transfer to Mumbai for your onward journey. Enjoy a final shopping spree at Colaba Causeway or a relaxed stroll along Marine Drive before heading to the airport.

INBOUND-55.overview: Embark on an 8-day Cultural Odyssey through India’s historic heartland, exploring royal heritage, ancient architecture, and spiritual traditions. This journey covers iconic landmarks, UNESCO World Heritage sites, and vibrant cultural experiences across Rajasthan, Uttar Pradesh, and Madhya Pradesh.

days.title: Arrival in Sawai Madhopur
days.description: Arrive at Sawai Madhopur, the gateway to Ranthambore National Park. Spend the evening relaxing and preparing for the adventure ahead with a local dinner featuring Rajasthani cuisine.

days.title: Sawai Madhopur – Ranthambore Safari
days.description: Embark on a morning and evening safari in Ranthambore National Park, home to Bengal tigers and diverse wildlife. Visit the historic Ranthambore Fort, a UNESCO site, perched atop a hill with panoramic views.

days.title: Jaipur – Pink City Exploration
days.description: Explore Jaipur’s iconic landmarks including the Amber Fort, Hawa Mahal, and City Palace. Stroll through bustling bazaars to shop for traditional handicrafts and jewelry.

days.title: Jaipur – Cultural Heritage
days.description: Visit Jantar Mantar, an astronomical observatory, and Albert Hall Museum. Enjoy a cultural evening with folk dances and Rajasthani folk music performance.

days.title: Agra – Taj Mahal & Fort
days.description: Marvel at the Taj Mahal at sunrise, followed by a visit to Agra Fort. Explore the intricate marble work and Mughal architecture that define these UNESCO World Heritage sites.

days.title: Gwalior – Fort & Temples
days.description: Discover Gwalior Fort, one of India’s largest forts, and the intricately carved Sas Bahu Temples. Visit the Jai Vilas Palace to see its grand Durbar Hall and chandeliers.

days.title: Khajuraho – Temples of Love
days.description: Explore the UNESCO-listed Khajuraho Group of Monuments, renowned for their intricate carvings depicting life and love. Attend the evening light and sound show to learn about the temples' history.

days.title: Varanasi – Spiritual Ganges
days.description: Witness the sacred rituals along the Ganges River in Varanasi, including the Ganga Aarti at Dashashwamedh Ghat. Visit the Kashi Vishwanath Temple and explore the labyrinthine alleys of the old city.

days.title: Departure from Delhi
days.description: Transfer to Delhi for your onward journey. Depending on flight schedules, enjoy a brief city tour or visit Humayun’s Tomb or Qutub Minar before departing.

INBOUND-56.overview: Embark on a cultural journey through India's royal heritage, exploring majestic forts, palaces, and desert landscapes. This 8-day tour traces the historic Deccan region, blending history, architecture, and local traditions.

days.title: Arrival in Agra – Taj Mahal at dusk
days.description: Arrive in Agra and check into your heritage hotel. Enjoy a mesmerizing sunset view of the iconic Taj Mahal, followed by a light and sound show narrating its history.

days.title: Agra – Mughal wonders and forts
days.description: Visit the Agra Fort and the ethereal Taj Mahal at sunrise. Explore the intricate marble work of Itmad-ud-Daulah’s Tomb before heading to the bustling local markets for souvenirs.

days.title: Sawai Madhopur – Ranthambore safari
days.description: Travel to Sawai Madhopur and embark on a thrilling jeep safari in Ranthambore National Park, home to Bengal tigers and historic ruins. Enjoy a cultural dance performance in the evening.

days.title: Udaipur – City of lakes and palaces
days.description: Explore the grand City Palace, serene Lake Pichola, and the romantic Jag Mandir Island. Witness a traditional Rajasthani puppet show and stroll through the vibrant bazaars.

days.title: Jodhpur – Blue city and Mehrangarh
days.description: Discover the towering Mehrangarh Fort and its museum. Walk through the blue-painted streets of the Old City and visit Jaswant Thada, a stunning marble cenotaph.

days.title: Jaisalmer – Golden desert and forts
days.description: Tour the golden-hued Jaisalmer Fort and the intricately carved Jain temples. Enjoy a camel ride in the Thar Desert at sunset, followed by a traditional Rajasthani dinner under the stars.

days.title: Jaipur – Pink City heritage walk
days.description: Visit the Amber Fort, Hawa Mahal, and the astronomical Jantar Mantar. Experience a heritage walk in the old city, exploring bazaars and local crafts before a cultural evening.

days.title: Departure from Delhi
days.description: Transfer to Delhi for your onward journey. Enjoy a farewell breakfast at a heritage café before heading to the airport for departure.

INBOUND-65.overview: Explore the pristine coral reefs and turquoise waters of the Andaman and Nicobar Islands. This 7-day itinerary takes you from Port Blair to the stunning beaches of Havelock Island and Neil Island, offering snorkeling, diving, and cultural experiences.

days.title: Arrival in Port Blair
days.description: Arrive at Veer Savarkar International Airport in Port Blair. Transfer to your hotel and check-in. Spend the afternoon exploring the local markets and visiting the Cellular Jail for a glimpse into India's colonial history. Evening at leisure.

days.title: Port Blair to Havelock Island
days.description: Morning ferry to Havelock Island (approx. 2 hours). Check-in at a beachfront resort. Afternoon at Radhanagar Beach, one of Asia's best beaches, for relaxation and swimming. Evening at leisure.

days.title: Havelock Island - Snorkeling & Beach Day
days.description: Full-day snorkeling trip to Elephant Beach or North Bay Island. Explore vibrant coral reefs and marine life. Alternatively, visit Vijaynagar Beach and enjoy water activities. Evening at leisure.

days.title: Havelock Island to Neil Island
days.description: Morning ferry to Neil Island (approx. 1.5 hours). Check-in at a beachside resort. Afternoon visit to Bharatpur Beach and Sitapur Beach for relaxation and photography. Evening at leisure.

days.title: Neil Island - Island Exploration
days.description: Full-day island tour visiting Natural Bridge, Lakshmanpur Beach, and the local village. Enjoy fresh seafood and local cuisine. Evening at leisure.

days.title: Neil Island to Port Blair
days.description: Morning ferry back to Port Blair. Afternoon visit to the Chidiya Tapu for sunset views and local flora/fauna. Evening at leisure.

days.title: Departure from Port Blair
days.description: Morning at leisure for last-minute shopping or sightseeing. Transfer to the airport for your departure flight.

INBOUND-66.overview: A 7-day journey through the scenic beauty of Meghalaya, exploring lush landscapes, waterfalls, caves, and cultural gems. The tour begins in Shillong, the capital of Meghalaya, and includes visits to Jowai, Cherrapunji, Mawsynram, and concludes with a return to Guwahati.

days.title: Arrival in Shillong
days.description: Arrive in Shillong, the 'Scotland of the East.' Check into your hotel and explore the local markets like Bara Bazaar. Visit Ward's Lake and Elephant Falls in the evening. Overnight stay in Shillong.

days.title: Shillong Exploration
days.description: Visit the Don Bosco Museum to learn about the cultural heritage of the Northeast. Explore the Shillong Peak for panoramic views and visit the Lady Hydari Park. In the evening, enjoy a traditional Khasi meal. Overnight in Shillong.

days.title: Shillong to Jowai
days.description: Drive to Jowai, the cultural hub of the Jaintia Hills. Visit the famous Jowai Lake and the Thadlaskein Lake. Explore the local markets and interact with the Jaintia tribes. Overnight stay in Jowai.

days.title: Jowai to Cherrapunji
days.description: Travel to Cherrapunji, known for its living root bridges and heavy rainfall. Visit the Nohkalikai Falls, the Mawsmai Caves, and the Seven Sisters Falls. Explore the local Khasi villages and their unique architecture. Overnight in Cherrapunji.

days.title: Cherrapunji to Mawsynram
days.description: Visit Mawsynram, the wettest place on Earth. Explore the Krem Phyllut Caves and the Mawsmai Viewpoint. Enjoy the lush greenery and waterfalls along the way. Return to Shillong in the evening. Overnight in Shillong.

days.title: Shillong to Guwahati
days.description: Drive to Guwahati, the gateway to Northeast India. Visit the Kamakhya Temple and the Assam State Zoo. Explore the local markets and enjoy a cultural performance in the evening. Overnight in Guwahati.

days.title: Departure from Guwahati
days.description: After breakfast, transfer to the airport for your onward journey.

INBOUND-68.overview: A 10-day immersive journey through the scenic landscapes and cultural richness of Meghalaya, India. Starting in Shillong, the 'Scotland of the East,' this tour explores the lush hills, living root bridges, and vibrant local traditions of Cherrapunji, Mawlyngbna, and Jowai before concluding in Guwahati.

days.title: Arrival in Shillong
days.description: Arrive in Shillong, the capital of Meghalaya. Check into your hotel and spend the evening exploring the bustling markets of Police Bazaar and local eateries. Overnight in Shillong.

days.title: Exploring Shillong
days.description: Visit the Elephant Falls, Ward's Lake, and the Don Bosco Museum to learn about the region's tribal cultures. In the evening, enjoy a cultural performance or local cuisine. Overnight in Shillong.

days.title: Shillong to Cherrapunji
days.description: Drive to Cherrapunji (Cherrapunjee), a town known for its living root bridges and heavy rainfall. Visit the Nohkalikai Falls, Mawsmai Cave, and the double-decker living root bridge. Overnight in Cherrapunji.

days.title: Cherrapunji Exploration
days.description: Explore more of Cherrapunji's natural wonders, including the Seven Sisters Falls, Thangkharang Park, and the Mawsmai Viewpoint. Visit local villages to learn about the Khasi culture. Overnight in Cherrapunji.

days.title: Cherrapunji to Mawlyngbna
days.description: Travel to Mawlyngbna, a serene eco-village surrounded by forests and rivers. Enjoy nature walks, village tours, and local hospitality. Overnight in Mawlyngbna.

days.title: Adventure in Mawlyngbna
days.description: Engage in outdoor activities like trekking, river crossing, or camping in the wilderness. Visit nearby waterfalls and enjoy the tranquility of the village. Overnight in Mawlyngbna.

days.title: Mawlyngbna to Jowai
days.description: Drive to Jowai, the cultural hub of the Jaintia Hills. Visit the Jowai Lake, Thadlaskein Lake, and the local markets. Enjoy the scenic beauty and local cuisine. Overnight in Jowai.

days.title: Jowai Exploration
days.description: Explore the historical and cultural sites of Jowai, including the Jaintia Kingdom's remnants, local churches, and tribal villages. Participate in traditional games or festivals if available. Overnight in Jowai.

days.title: Jowai to Guwahati
days.description: Travel to Guwahati, the gateway to Northeast India. Visit the Kamakhya Temple, Umananda Island, and the local markets. Enjoy a farewell dinner. Overnight in Guwahati.

days.title: Departure from Guwahati
days.description: After breakfast, transfer to the airport or railway station for your onward journey.

INBOUND-70.overview: A 12-day journey showcasing the cultural, scenic, and adventure highlights of Himachal Pradesh, from colonial Shimla to the high-altitude deserts of Spiti Valley, including serene lakes, ancient monasteries, and Himalayan vistas.

days.title: Arrival in Shimla
days.description: Arrive in Shimla, the capital of Himachal Pradesh. Check into your hotel and spend the evening exploring the Ridge and Mall Road. Overnight in Shimla.

days.title: Explore Shimla
days.description: Visit the Jakhu Temple, Christ Church, and Kufri for panoramic views. Enjoy local Himachali cuisine and return to Shimla for the night.

days.title: Shimla to Manali
days.description: Drive from Shimla to Manali (approx. 7-8 hours). En route, stop at Kufri and Narkanda for scenic views. Arrive in Manali and check into your hotel. Overnight in Manali.

days.title: Manali Sightseeing
days.description: Visit Hadimba Temple, Old Manali, and the Hidimba Devi Temple. Explore the local markets and enjoy the evening by the river. Overnight in Manali.

days.title: Manali to Kaza
days.description: Drive from Manali to Kaza (approx. 8-9 hours). En route, visit Rohtang Pass (if weather permits) and Gramphu. Arrive in Kaza and check into your hotel. Overnight in Kaza.

days.title: Explore Kaza and Key Monastery
days.description: Visit Key Monastery, the largest in Spiti Valley. Explore the local markets and interact with the locals. Overnight in Kaza.

days.title: Kaza to Chandratal Lake
days.description: Drive from Kaza to Chandratal Lake (approx. 4-5 hours). En route, visit Losar Village and enjoy the stunning views of the lake. Camp overnight near Chandratal.

days.title: Chandratal Lake to Narkanda
days.description: Drive from Chandratal Lake to Narkanda (approx. 6-7 hours). En route, stop at Kunzum Pass and visit the local monasteries. Arrive in Narkanda and check into your hotel. Overnight in Narkanda.

days.title: Narkanda Sightseeing
days.description: Visit the Hatu Mata Temple and enjoy the panoramic views of the Himalayas. Explore the apple orchards and local villages. Overnight in Narkanda.

days.title: Narkanda to Shimla
days.description: Drive from Narkanda to Shimla (approx. 5-6 hours). En route, stop at Tattapani for a relaxing dip in the hot springs. Arrive in Shimla and check into your hotel. Overnight in Shimla.

days.title: Shimla to Chandigarh
days.description: Drive from Shimla to Chandigarh (approx. 4-5 hours). Visit the Rock Garden and Sukhna Lake. Overnight in Chandigarh.

days.title: Departure from Chandigarh
days.description: Depart from Chandigarh International Airport.

INBOUND-TEST-01.overview: This 15-day tour explores Karnataka's cultural heritage and natural beauty before ending with Goa's serene beaches. Starting in Bangalore, it covers historic Mysore, lush Chikmagalur, Hampi's ruins, Badami's ancient caves, and concludes with Goa's vibrant coastal charm.

days.title: Arrival in Bangalore
days.description: Arrive in Bengaluru, check into your hotel, and relax after the journey. In the evening, explore MG Road for shopping and local cuisine or visit the bustling Brigade Road.

days.title: Bangalore sightseeing
days.description: Visit the iconic Bangalore Palace and the Vidhana Soudha. Spend the afternoon at Lalbagh Botanical Garden, known for its glasshouse and diverse plant species.

days.title: Bangalore to Mysore
days.description: Travel to Mysore (3 hours), stopping at Shivanasamudra Falls. Visit the Mysore Palace in the evening during the illuminated light show.

days.title: Mysore exploration
days.description: Explore the Mysore Zoo and the historic St. Philomena’s Church. Visit Brindavan Gardens in the evening for a musical fountain show.

days.title: Mysore to Chikmagalur
days.description: Drive to Chikmagalur (3.5 hours), passing coffee plantations. Visit the serene Hoysala temples at Amruthapura and Kalaseshwara.

days.title: Chikmagalur nature tour
days.description: Hike to Mullayanagiri peak, the highest in Karnataka. Explore the lush green landscapes of Bhadra Wildlife Sanctuary.

days.title: Chikmagalur to Hospet
days.description: Travel to Hospet (5 hours), stopping at Belur and Halebidu for their stunning Hoysala architecture. Check into a hotel near Hampi.

days.title: Hampi ruins exploration
days.description: Spend the day exploring the UNESCO-listed ruins of Hampi, including Virupaksha Temple and the Stone Chariot. Visit the sunset viewpoint at Matanga Hill.

days.title: Hampi to Badami
days.description: Drive to Badami (3 hours), visiting Aihole’s ancient temples en route. Check into a hotel near Badami caves.

days.title: Badami caves and temples
days.description: Explore the rock-cut Badami Cave Temples and the historic Agastya Lake. Visit the ancient Durga Temple and Pattadakal’s UNESCO sites.

days.title: Badami to Goa
days.description: Travel to Goa (7 hours), stopping at Dandeli for a short nature break. Arrive in North Goa and check into a beachside resort.

days.title: Goa beaches and markets
days.description: Relax at Baga Beach and explore the vibrant Anjuna Flea Market. Enjoy a beachside seafood dinner in the evening.

days.title: Goa cultural tour
days.description: Visit Old Goa’s churches like Basilica of Bom Jesus and Sé Cathedral. Explore Fontainhas, the Latin Quarter, in Panjim.

days.title: Goa water sports
days.description: Engage in water sports like parasailing or jet skiing at Palolem Beach. Spend the evening at a beach shack enjoying Goan feni and seafood.

days.title: Departure from Goa
days.description: Enjoy a leisurely breakfast at the resort before heading to the airport for your departure. Relish the memories of your Karnataka-Goa journey.

INBOUND-TEST-02.overview: Explore India's iconic Golden Triangle route, covering Delhi, Agra, and Jaipur. This 7-day itinerary includes historical landmarks, cultural experiences, and local cuisine.

days.title: Arrival in Delhi
days.description: Arrive in Delhi, check into your hotel, and relax. In the evening, explore nearby markets like Connaught Place or Chandni Chowk for street food and shopping.

days.title: Delhi Sightseeing
days.description: Visit historical sites including the Red Fort, Jama Masjid, Humayun's Tomb, and Qutub Minar. End the day with a cultural show or a visit to Dilli Haat for local crafts.

days.title: Travel to Agra
days.description: Morning drive to Agra (3-4 hours). Visit the Taj Mahal at sunset, followed by Agra Fort. Enjoy Mughlai cuisine for dinner.

days.title: Agra Exploration
days.description: Early morning visit to the Taj Mahal at sunrise, then explore Fatehpur Sikri (if time permits) or the local markets. Evening drive to Jaipur (4-5 hours).

days.title: Jaipur City Tour
days.description: Visit Amber Fort, Hawa Mahal, City Palace, and Jantar Mantar. Enjoy a traditional Rajasthani dinner with folk performances.

days.title: Jaipur Local Experiences
days.description: Explore local markets like Johari Bazaar for handicrafts, visit Albert Hall Museum, and relax at a heritage hotel. Optional: Hot air balloon ride at sunrise.

days.title: Departure from Delhi
days.description: Morning drive back to Delhi (5-6 hours). Depending on your flight time, visit a local attraction like the Lotus Temple or India Gate before departure.

INBOUND-TEST-03.overview: An 11-day spiritual journey tracing the footsteps of Buddha, starting in Delhi and covering key Buddhist pilgrimage sites across India and Nepal, including Varanasi, Bodhgaya, Kushinagar, Lumbini, and Sravasti.

days.title: Arrival in Delhi
days.description: Arrive in Delhi, the capital city. Visit the India Gate, Humayun's Tomb, and explore the bustling markets of Chandni Chowk. Overnight stay in Delhi.

days.title: Delhi to Varanasi
days.description: Morning flight to Varanasi. Explore the spiritual heart of India with a boat ride on the Ganges, visit the Kashi Vishwanath Temple, and attend the Ganga Aarti at Dashashwamedh Ghat. Overnight in Varanasi.

days.title: Varanasi to Bodhgaya
days.description: Morning flight to Gaya, followed by a drive to Bodhgaya. Visit the Mahabodhi Temple, the Bodhi Tree, and the Great Buddha Statue. Explore the local monasteries and markets. Overnight in Bodhgaya.

days.title: Bodhgaya Exploration
days.description: Full day in Bodhgaya. Visit the Mahabodhi Temple Complex, participate in meditation sessions, and explore the Tibetan, Japanese, and Thai monasteries. Evening visit to the Sujata Stupa. Overnight in Bodhgaya.

days.title: Bodhgaya to Patna
days.description: Morning drive to Patna. Visit the Patna Museum, Golghar, and the Takht Sri Patna Sahib Gurudwara. Explore the local markets and cuisine. Overnight in Patna.

days.title: Patna to Kushinagar
days.description: Morning drive to Kushinagar. Visit the Mahaparinirvana Temple, Ramabhar Stupa, and the Nirvana Stupa. Explore the local Buddhist sites and monasteries. Overnight in Kushinagar.

days.title: Kushinagar to Lumbini
days.description: Morning drive to the Nepalese border, followed by a short journey to Lumbini. Visit the Maya Devi Temple, the sacred Bodhi Tree, and the monasteries built by different Buddhist countries. Overnight in Lumbini.

days.title: Lumbini Exploration
days.description: Full day in Lumbini. Visit the Lumbini Monastic Zone, the World Peace Pagoda, and the Lumbini Crane Sanctuary. Explore the local markets and interact with the monastic community. Overnight in Lumbini.

days.title: Lumbini to Sravasti
days.description: Morning drive to Sravasti. Visit the Jetavana Monastery, the Anathapindika Stupa, and the Saheth-Maheth ruins. Explore the ancient Buddhist sites and the local culture. Overnight in Sravasti.

days.title: Sravasti to Delhi
days.description: Morning drive to Lucknow, followed by a flight to Delhi. Explore the local markets and enjoy a farewell dinner. Overnight in Delhi.

days.title: Departure from Delhi
days.description: Morning free for last-minute shopping or sightseeing. Transfer to the airport for departure.

INBOUND-TEST-32.overview: Explore India's royal heritage through its magnificent forts and palaces, from the Shekhawati havelis to the grand palaces of Rajasthan. This 12-day journey traces the legacy of Rajput rulers, blending history, architecture, and culture across historic forts and heritage hotels.

days.title: Arrival in Delhi – Transfer to Neemrana
days.description: Arrive in Delhi and transfer to Neemrana Fort Palace, a 15th-century hilltop fort converted into a heritage hotel. Enjoy a relaxed evening with panoramic views of the Aravalli hills and a traditional Rajasthani welcome.

days.title: Neemrana – Explore the Fort Palace
days.description: Spend the day exploring Neemrana Fort Palace, including its palaces, waterfalls, and stepwells. Visit the nearby Neemrana Baori and enjoy cultural performances in the evening.

days.title: Neemrana to Mandawa – Heritage Walk
days.description: Drive to Mandawa, the heart of Shekhawati, and explore its ornate havelis like Mandawa Haveli and Murmuria Haveli. Enjoy a heritage walk through the painted streets and step into a bygone era.

days.title: Mandawa – Shekhawati Art Tour
days.description: Visit lesser-known havelis such as Jhunjhunwala Haveli and Gulab Rai Ladia Haveli. Learn about fresco art and traditional Rajasthani architecture from local guides.

days.title: Mandawa to Gajner – Desert Safari
days.description: Travel to Gajner and enjoy a camel safari in the Thar Desert. Visit Gajner Palace, a lakeside retreat of the Bikaner royal family, and explore its hunting lodge history.

days.title: Gajner to Rohet Garh – Village & Palace
days.description: Proceed to Rohet Garh and tour the 16th-century fort-palace. Visit the nearby Pichiyak village to experience rural Rajasthan and interact with local artisans.

days.title: Rohet Garh to Deogarh – Scenic Drive
days.description: Drive through scenic countryside to Deogarh and check into Deogarh Mahal, a restored 17th-century palace. Enjoy a sunset walk around the serene lake and village.

days.title: Deogarh – Palace & Local Crafts
days.description: Explore Deogarh Mahal’s interiors, including the Durbar Hall and royal chambers. Visit local pottery and textile workshops to see traditional craftsmanship.

days.title: Deogarh to Udaipur – City of Lakes
days.description: Travel to Udaipur and visit City Palace, Jagdish Temple, and the serene Lake Pichola. Enjoy a sunset boat ride and dinner at a rooftop restaurant.

days.title: Udaipur – Heritage & Culture
days.description: Explore the lesser-known Jagdish Chowk and Saheliyon-ki-Bari. Visit the Bagore Ki Haveli for a cultural evening with folk dances and puppet shows.

days.title: Udaipur to Bundi – Hidden Gem
days.description: Drive to Bundi and tour the Taragarh Fort and stepwells like Raniji ki Baori. Explore the narrow bazaars and admire the blue-painted houses.

days.title: Bundi to Jaipur – Pink City Arrival
days.description: Travel to Jaipur and visit the Amber Fort and Hawa Mahal. Enjoy a farewell dinner at a heritage property, reflecting on the royal journey through India.

INBOUND-TEST-37.overview: A 12-day cultural and tribal journey through Odisha, starting in Bhubaneswar, exploring ancient temples, coastal towns, and tribal heartlands, before concluding in Visakhapatnam. Experience heritage, nature, and indigenous traditions.

days.title: Arrival in Bhubaneswar
days.description: Arrive at Bhubaneswar airport or railway station. Check into a heritage hotel in the city center. Evening at leisure to explore local markets or relax. Overnight in Bhubaneswar.

days.title: Bhubaneswar - City of Temples
days.description: Full-day tour of Bhubaneswar’s ancient temples including Lingaraj Temple, Mukteshwar Temple, and Rajarani Temple. Visit the Odisha State Museum and evening at Ekamra Walks heritage walk. Overnight in Bhubaneswar.

days.title: Bhubaneswar to Puri
days.description: Morning drive to Puri (60 km, ~1.5 hrs). Visit the iconic Jagannath Temple and explore the sacred town. Visit the Puri Beach and Swargadwar cremation site. Evening at leisure. Overnight in Puri.

days.title: Puri - Cultural & Coastal Exploration
days.description: Visit the Chilika Lake (Asia’s largest brackish water lagoon) for boat ride and dolphin spotting. Explore the village of Pipli for appliqué craft. Return to Puri for sunset at the beach. Overnight in Puri.

days.title: Puri to Gopalpur-on-Sea
days.description: Morning drive to Gopalpur-on-Sea (180 km, ~4 hrs). Relax at the serene beach and visit the historic Gopalpur Lighthouse. Evening stroll along the promenade. Overnight in Gopalpur.

days.title: Gopalpur to Rayagada
days.description: Morning drive to Rayagada (200 km, ~5 hrs). En route, stop at the tribal village of Koraput for cultural insights. Arrive in Rayagada, check in, and visit local markets. Overnight in Rayagada.

days.title: Rayagada - Tribal Heritage
days.description: Full-day tribal tour to nearby villages like Bissam Cuttack to interact with Kondh and Dongria Kondh tribes. Experience their lifestyle, crafts, and festivals. Overnight in Rayagada.

days.title: Rayagada to Jeypore
days.description: Morning drive to Jeypore (120 km, ~3 hrs). Visit the Jeypore Palace and local markets. Evening at leisure. Overnight in Jeypore.

days.title: Jeypore - Tribal & Nature Tour
days.description: Day trip to tribal villages such as Machkund and Onukudelli. Explore waterfalls like Duduma and visit tribal markets. Return to Jeypore for overnight stay.

days.title: Jeypore to Visakhapatnam
days.description: Morning drive to Visakhapatnam (250 km, ~6 hrs). Visit the Kailasagiri Hill for panoramic views and the RK Beach. Overnight in Visakhapatnam.

days.title: Visakhapatnam - Coastal & Cultural Highlights
days.description: Visit the INS Kursura Submarine Museum, Dolphin’s Nose Lighthouse, and the Simhachalam Temple. Explore the city’s seafood and shopping. Overnight in Visakhapatnam.

days.title: Departure from Visakhapatnam
days.description: Morning at leisure or optional visit to the Andhra Pradesh State Museum. Transfer to Visakhapatnam airport or railway station for departure.

FIT-INBOUND-18.overview: A spiritual journey to the Kumbh Mela Special 2027 in Nashik, featuring sacred rituals, cultural experiences, and divine gatherings.

days.title: Arrival in Nashik & Evening Aarti
days.description: Arrive in Nashik, check-in at the designated accommodation. Attend the evening Ganga Aarti at the Godavari Ghat, followed by a cultural welcome dinner.

days.title: Kumbh Mela Darshan & Sacred Bath
days.description: Participate in the early morning Shahi Snan (Royal Bath) at the Kumbh Mela grounds. Explore the spiritual stalls, attend discourses by saints, and enjoy the vibrant festival atmosphere.

days.title: Spiritual Exploration & Cultural Performances
days.description: Visit the Sita Gufa, Kapila Muni Temple, and other sacred sites in Nashik. In the evening, witness traditional folk performances and devotional music at the Kumbh Mela.

days.title: Departure & Final Blessings
days.description: Morning visit to Trimbakeshwar Jyotirlinga for final prayers. Post-lunch, proceed to the airport/railway station for departure.
